chapters.text: Adam, Seth, Enosh;
Kenan, Mahal’alel, Jared;
Enoch, Me-thu’selah, Lamech;
Noah, Shem, Ham chule Japheth.
Japheth chapate chu Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshech chule Tiras ahiuve.
Gomer chapate chu Ash’kenaz, Diphath, chule Togarmah ahiuve.
Javan chapate chu Elishah, Tarshish, Kittim chule Ro’danim ahiuve.
Ham chapate chu Cush, Egypt, Put chule Canaan ahiuve.
Cush chapate chu Seba, Hav’ilah, Sabta, Ra’ama, chule Sab’teca ahiuve. Ra’ama chapa teni chu Sheba le Dedan ahilhone.
Cush hin Nimrod kitipa chu ahingin, Nimrod hi leiset chunga mihat khat’in ahung pang tai.
Egypt jong hin Ludim le An’amim toh, Leha’bim toh, Naph-tu’him toh,
Pathrusim toh Casluhim toh, anahingin, hiche Caslu’him kitipa a kona hi Philistine ho leh Caph’torim ho hung kondoh ahiuve.
Canaan hin chapa Sidon kitipa chu ahing masapenin, chuin Heth kitipa chu a hinge:
chule Jebus mite ahiuvin, Amor mite ahiuvin, Gir’gash mite ahiuvin,
Hivi mite ahiuvin, Ark mite ahiuvin, Sin mite ahiuvin,
Ar’vad mite ahiuvin, Zemar mite ahiuvin, chule Ha’math mite jong ahiuve.
Shem chapate chu Elam, Asshur, Arpach’shad, Lud, Aram, Uz, Hul, Gether, chule Meshech ahiuve.
Arpach’shad kitipa hin Shelah ahingin, Shelah kitipa hin Eber ahinge.
Eber hin chapa ni ahingin, khatpa chu amin Peleg akiti; ijeh-inem itileh ama khang laiya leiset mite kikhentel anahi, chule khatjo pa asopipa min chu Joktan ahi.
Joktan hin Almo’dad le Sheleph toh, Hazarma’veth toh, Jerah toh,
Hador’am toh, Uzal toh, Diklah toh,
Ebal toh, Abim’a-el toh, Sheba toh,
Ophir toh, Hav’ilah toh chule Jobab ahingin ahi; mi hichengse hi abonchauva Joktan chate jeng ahiuvin ahi.
Shem, Arpach’shad, Shelah;
Eber, Peleg, Re’u;
Serug, Nahor, Terah;
Abram, ama hi Abraham kitipa chu ahi.
Abraham chapa teni chu Isaac le Ishmael ahilhone.
Akhanggui kisimdanu chu hiti hi ahiye: Ishmael chapa apeng masapa chu Neba’ioth ahin, chuin Kedar ahin, Adbeel, Mibsam.
Mishma, Dumah, Massa, Hadad, Tema,
Jetur, Naphish chule Ked’emah ahi. Hicheng hi Ishmael chapate ahiuve.
Abraham thaikemnu Keturah chapate chu, amanu hin Zimran, Jokshan, Medan, Midi’an, Ishbak chule Shu’ah ahingin ahi. Jokshan chapa teni chu Sheba le Dedan ahilhone.
Midi’an chapate chu Ephah, Epher, Hanoch, Abida chule Elda’ah ahiuve. Mi hichengse hi Keturah son achilhah jeng ahiuvin ahi.
Abraham hin Isaac anahingin; Isaac chapa teni chu Esau le Israel ahilhone.
Esau chapate chu Eli’phaz toh, Reu’el toh, Je’ush toh, Jalam toh chule Korah ahiuve.
Eli’phaz chapate chu Teman le Omar toh, Zephi toh, Gatam toh, Kenaz toh, Timna toh chule Am’alek toh ahiuve.
Reu’el chapate chu Nahath, Zerah, Shammah chule Mizzah ahiuvin ahi.
Se’ir chapate chu Lotan, Shobal, Zib’eon le Anah toh, Dishon toh, Ezer le Dishan ahiuve.
Lotan chapa teni chu Hori le Homam ahilhonin, chule Lotan sopinu chu Timna akiti.
Shobal chapate chu Al’ian le Man’ahath leh Ebal toh, Shephi toh chule Onam ahiuve. Zib’eon chapa teni chu Ai’ah le Anah ahilhone.
Anah chapa chu Dishon ahin; Dishon chapate chu Hamran le Eshban toh, Ithran toh, chule Cheran ahiuve.
Ezer chapate chu Bilhan ahin, Za’avan ahin, chule Ja’akan ahi. Dishan chapa teni chu Uz le Aran ahilhone.
Israelte chunga mi koima lengvaipoa pang anaum masanga Edom gamsunga lengvaipoa anapang miho chu leng hijat hi ahiuve: Be’or chapa Bela ahin, akhopi min jong Din’habah akiti.
Bela athi phat’in ama khel’in Bozrah khoa mi Zerah chapa Jobab chun lengvai anapoi.
Jobab athi kit phat chun ama khel’in Te’man mite gamsunga mi Husham kitipa chun lengvai anapon ahi.
Husham athi phat’in ama khel’in Moab gamsunga Midan mite kisatpia jou jengpa Bedad chapa Hadad chun lengvai a poi; akhopi min jong Avith akitin ahiye.
Hadad athi kit phat chun ama khel’in Masre’kah khoa mi Samlah chun ama khel’in lengvai apotai.
Samlah thi phat’in ama khel’in Euphrates luipi dunga cheng Reho’both khoa mi Sha’ul kitipa chun lengvai apoi.
Sha’ul thi nungin ama khel chun Achbor chapa Ba’al-ha’nan kitipa chun lengvai apon ahi.
Ba’al-ha’nan athi kit phat’in ama khel’in Hadad chun lengvai apoi; ama hi akhopi minjong Pa’i akitin, chule ajinu min Mehet’abel ahin, Mazahab tunu Matred chanu anahi.
Hadad jong athi kit tai. Edom gama haosa ho chu: Timna kho haosapu, Al’iah kho haosapu, Jetheth kho haosapu,
Oholiba’mah kho haosapu, Elah kho haosapu, Pinon kho haosapu,
Kenaz kho haosapu, Teman kho haosapu, Mibzar kho haosapu,
Mag’di-el kho haosapu toh chule Iram kho haosapu toh ahiuve; mi hichengse hi Edom gama haosa jeng ahiuvin ahi.
Israel chapate chu mi hicheng hi ahiuve; Reuben, Simeon, Levi, Judah, Is’sachar, Zeb’ulun,
Dan, Joseph, Benjamin, Naph’tali, Gad, chule Asher.

Judah chapate chu Er le Onan toh, chule Shelah ahiuve; chapa hicheng thum hi Canaan numei nu Bath-shu’a kitinu chun ahinpeh ahi. Judah chapa apeng masapa Er kitipa hi Pakai mitmun agilou behseh jengin ahileh Pakaiyin jong amapa chu athat tai.
Judah hi amou nu Tamar jong chun Perez kitipa leh Zerah kitipa chu ahinpeh kit’in, hijeh chun Judah hin chapa nga jen aneiyin ahi.
Perez chapa teni chu Hezron le Hamul ahi.
Zerah chapate chu Zimri le Ethan toh, Heman le Calcol toh, chule Dara ahiuvin mi nga alhinguve.
Carmi chapa chu Achar ahin, amahin suhmang dinga kikoisa thil ho chunga Israelte anabol gim lheh jengin ahi;
Ethan chapa chu Azari’ah akiti.
Hezron hin achapate chu Jerah’meel toh, Ram toh chule Chelu’bai ahiuve;
Ram hin Ammin’adab ahingin, chule Ammin’adab hin Judahte leng chapa Nahshon chu ahingin ahi.
Nahshon hin Salma ahingin, Salma hin Bo’az ahingin;
Bo’az chun Obed ahingin, Obed hin Jesse ahinge.
Jesse chapa apeng masapen chu Eli’ab ahin, abana pa Abin’adab ahin, athum lhin na pa Shim’ea ahin;
Nethan’el chu achapa li lhin na ahin, Raddai chu nga lhin na ahi;
Ozem chu achapa gup lhin na ahin chule David chu sagi lhinna ahitai;
amaho hin sopi numei ni aneiyun amin lhon jong Zeru’iah leh Abigail ahilhone. Zeru’iah hin chapa thum ahingin, Abi’shai le Jo’ab toh chule As’ahel ahiuve.
Ab’igail hin Amasa kitipa chu ahingin, Amasa hingpa apa chu Ishmael mi Jether kitipa chu ahi.
Hezron chapa Caleb jong hin ajinu Azu’bah kitinu Jer’ioth khoa minu chutoh cha phabep ahing lhonin, amanu chapate chu Jesher le Shobab toh chule Ardon hicheng hi ahiuvin ahi.
Azu’bah hi athi phat’in Caleb’in Ephrath kitinu chu akichen pi kit’in, amanu hin Hur kitipa chu ahinpeh-in ahi.
Hur hin Uri ahingin, chule Uri hin Bez’alel kitipa chu ahinge.
Khonung nungin akum kum somgup jen alhingin Hezron kitipa hin Gilead pa Machir chanu chu akichenpin, akoma agalut’a akitimatpia ahileh, amanu hin Segub ahinpeh-in ahi.
Chule Segub hin Ja’ir kitipa chu ahingin, Ja’ir hin khopi jeng jeng som ni le thum jen Gilead gamsunga anasemdoh jengin ahi.

Ahin khopi hijat lah a hin Geshur le Aram chun Ja’ir-ngahmun khopi toh, Kenath khopi toh chule akhobah chengse kholen cheh somgup jen alah tha lhon tai. Akisei mi hijatpi hi Gilead hingpa Machir son achilhah jeng ahiuvin ahi.
Hezron thi nungin Caleb jong hin apa Hezron jinu Ephrathah kitinu chu agavil’in akitimatpia ahileh, amanun jong Teko’a hingpa Ashhur chu anahinpeh-in ahi.
Hezron chapa apeng masapen Jerah’meel chapate chu apeng masapen Ram ahin, Bunah ahin, Oren ahin, Ozem ahin, chule Ahi’jah ahiuve.
Jerah’meel kitipa hin jichom khat jong aneiyin, amanu chu amin At’arah akiti; hiche nu hin Onam chu anahinge.
Jerah’meel cha masapa Ramchapate chu Ma’az le Jamin toh, chule Eker ahiuve.
Onam chapa teni chu Sham’mai le Jada ahilhon in, chule Sham’mai chapa teni chu Nadab le Abi’shur ahi kit lhone.
Abi’shur jinu chu amin Ab’ihail akitin, amanu hin Ahban le Molid ahinpeh-e.
Nadab chapa teni chu Seled le Ap’pa-im ahilhonin; chuin Seled hi cha nei louvin athitai.
Ap’pa-im chapa chu Ishi ahi. Ishi chapa chu Sheshan ahi kit’e; chule Sheshan chapa chu Ahlai ahi.
Sham’mai sopipa Jada chapa teni chu Jether le Jonathan ahilhonin, Jether vang hi cha nei louvin athitai.
Jonathan chapa teni chu Peleth le Zaza ahilhone. Mihem hijat hi Jerah’meel son achilhah ahiuve.
Sheshan injong chapa aneipon, chanu bou ahingin ahi; ahin Sheshan kitipa hin Egypt mi pasal khat soh aneiyin, amin jong Jarha akiti.
Sheshanin hiche asohpa Jarha kitipa hi achanu toh akichensah-in ahileh, achanun amapa hi Attai kitipa chu ahinpeh-in ahi.
Attai hin Nathan ahingin, Nathan hin Zabad ahinge.
Zabad hin Ephlal ahingin, Ephlal chun Obed ahingin ahi.
Obed hin Jehu ahingin, chule Jehu hin Azari’ah ahinge.
Azari’ah hin Helez ahingin, chule Helez hin Ele-asah ahingin ahi.
Ele-asah hin Sismai ahingin, chule Sismai hin Shallum ahingin ahi.
Shallum hin Jekami’ah ahingin, chule Jekami’ah hin Elish’ama ahinge.
Jerah’meel sopipa Caleb chapate lah a achapa apeng masapen Mare’shah kitipa hin Ziph ahingin, hiche Mare’shah hin Hebron jong ahinge.
Hebron chapate chu Korah le Tap’puah toh, Rekem le Shema ahiuve.
Shema hin Raham anahingin, Raham hin Jor’ke-am anahin ahiye. Chule Rekeni hin Sham’mai ahingin ahi.
Sham’mai chapa chu Ma’on ahin, chule Ma’on chun Bethzur ahingin ahi.
Caleb thaikemnu Ephah jong chun Haran le Moza toh chule Gazez ahinge; hichea hin Haran hin Gazez ahingin ahi.
Jah’dai chapate chu Regem le Jotham toh, Geshan le Pelet toh, Ephah le Sha’aph ahiuvin ahi.
Caleb thaikemnu Ma’acah jong chun Sheber le Tir’hanah ahingin ahi.
Amanu ma ma hin Madman’nah pa Sa’aph le Machbe’nah pa le Gib’e-a pa Sheva anahingin, chu-tengleh Caleb chanu khat chu Achsah ahiye.
Mihem hijat hi Caleb son achi-lhah jeng ahiuve. Eph’rathah cha masapa Hur chapate chu Kir’iath-je’arim pa Shobal le
Bethle-hem pa Salma toh, chule Beth-gader pa Hareph toh ahiuve.
Kir’iath-je’arim pa Shobal hin chapa adang jong aneiyin, amaho chu Haro’eh sung kon Menu’hoth miho toh,

Kir’iath-je’arim insung mite chutoh ahin, Ithir miho ahin, Puth miho ahiuvin, Shu’math miho ahiuvin, chule Mish’rai miho toh ahiuve; amahoa kona hi Zo’rath miho leh Esh’taol miho jong hung kondoh ahiuvin ahi.
Salma cha-pate chu Bethlehem ahin, Netoph’ath miho ahiuvin, At’roth-beth-jo’ab le Ma-naha’th mi akeh khat jen chu ahiuvin chule Zor miho jong ahiuvin ahi.

Jabez khoa cheng danthu lekha suna pang miho insung mite jong chu Ti’rath miho ahiuvin, Shim’e-ath miho ahiuvin, chule Su’cath miho jong ahiuve. Mihem hicheng hi Rechab insung penna Hammath kitipa sung peng ahiuvin, Ken mi jeng ahiuve.

Hebron khopia a chen laiya David’ in ahin achapate chu hicheng hi ahiuve: achapa apeng masapen chu Ammon ahin, Jezreel kho numeinu Ahin’o-am kitinu toh ahinlhon ahi; achapa ni lhinna pa chu Daniel ahin, Carmel kho numei nu Ab’igail toh ahinlhon ahi;
athum lhinna pa chu Ab’salom ahin, Ab’salom nu chu Ma’acah akitin. Geshur lengpa Talmai chanu ahi; achapa li lhinna pa chu Adoni’jah ahin, anu chu’ Haggith ahi;
nga lhinna pa chu Shephati’ah ahin, Abi’tal toh ahinlhon ahi; gup lhinna pa chu Ith’ream ahin, ajinu Eglah hin ahiye;
Hebron khopia kum sagi le lha gup sunga lengvaipoa anapan sungin David chun chapa gup hi anapingin ahi. Chujouvin kum som thum le kum thum sungin Jerusalem khopia lengvaipon anapangin ahi.
Jerusalem khopia achen laiya David’in anahin achapate chu Shim’e-a le Shobab toh, Nathan le Solomon ahiuvin, hicheng li hi Am’ini-el chanu Bath-shu’a toh ahinlhon ahi;
chujouvin Ibhar le Elish’ ama toh, Eliph’elet le
Nogah toh, Nepheg le Japhi’a ahin,
Elish’ama le Eli’ada toh, chule Eliph’elet ahiuvin ahi; a bonchan mi ko alhinguve.
Athaikem ho toh ahindoh ho tai louvin hichengse hi David chapate jeng ahiuvin, chule Tamar kitinu chubou sopi numeiya aneiyu ahibep’e.
Solomon son achilhah ho chu achapa Rehobo’am ahin, Rehobo’am chapa Abi’jah ahin, Abi’jah chapa Asa ahin, Asa chapa, Jehosh’aphat ahin,
Jehosh’aphat chapa Joram ahin, Joram chapa Ahazi’ah ahin, Ahazi’ah chapa Jo’ash ahin,
Jo’ash chapa Amazi’ah ahin, Amazi’ah chapa Azari’ah ahin, Azari’ah chapa Jotham ahin,
Jotham chapa Ahaz ahin, Ahaz chapa Hezeki’ah ahin, Hezeki’ah chapa Manas’seh ahin,
Manas’seh chapa Amon ahin, Amon chapa Josi’ah ahin,
Josi’ah chapate chu apeng masapen pa Joha’nan ahin, achapa nilhinna pa Jehoi’akim ahin, athum channa pa Zedeki’ah ahin, chule li lhinna pa Shallum ahi.
Jehoi’akim son achilhah ahileh: achapa teni Jecani’ ah le Jeconi’ah chapa Zedeki’ah ahilhone;
chutengle soh-changa kikaimang Jeconi’ah chapa le atute chu: achapa She-al’tiel ahin,
She-al’tiel chapate chu Malehi’ram ahin, Peda’iah ahin, Shenaz’zar ahin Jekami’ah ahin, Hosh’ama ahin, chule Nedabi’ah ahi;
chutengle Peda’ih chapa teni chu Zerub’babel le Shim’e-i ahilhone; chule Zerub’babal chapa teni chu Meshul’lam le Hanani’ah ahilhonin, amani sopinu chu Shelo’mith akiti.
Chule Hashu’bah le Ohel toh, Berechi’ah leh Hasadi’ah toh, chule Ju’shab-he’sed pumin mi nga jen ahiuve.
Hanani’ah chapa teni Pelati’ah leh Jesha’iah ahilhonin; Jesha’iah chapa Repha’iah ahin, Repha’iah chapa Aman ahin, Aman chapa Obadi’ah ahin, Obadi’ah chapa Shecani’ah ahi.
Shecani’ah chapa le atute chu achapa Shemai’ah ahin; chule Shemai’ah chapate chu Hattush ahin, Igal ahin, Bari’ah ahin, Neari’ah ahin chule Shaphat pumin mi gup alhinguve.
Neari’ah chapate chu Eli-o-e’nai le Hizki’ah toh chule Azri’kam pumin mi thum ahiuve.
EJi-o-e’nai chapate chu Hodavi’ah le Eli’ashib toh, Palei’ah le Akkub toh, Joha’nan le Dela’iah chule Ana’ni pumin mi sagi alhinguvin ahi.
Judah chapate chu Perez le Hezron, Carmi, Hur, chule Shobal ahiuve.
Shobal chapa Re-a’iah kitipa hin Jahath anahingin chule Jahath hin Ahu’mai le Lahad anahingin ahi. Hicheng hi Zo’rath insung mite jeng ahiuvin ahi.
Etam chapate chu Jezreel le Ishma toh, chule Idbash ahiuvin; chutengle asopinu u min chu Hazzelelpo’ni akiti.
Penu’el chun Gedor anahingin, chule Ezer chun Hushah anahinge. Bethlehem hingpa Eph’rathah chapa masapen Hur chapate chu hicheng chu ahiuve.
Teko’a pa Ashhur hin ji ni aneiyin amani chu Helah le Na’arah ahilhone;
Na’arah hin Ahuz’zam le Hepher toh, Te’meni toh chule Ha’abash’tari toh ahinpeh-in ahi. Hicheng mi hijat hi Na’arah chate jeng ahiuve.
Helah chapate chu Zereth le Izhar toh chule Ethnan ahiuve,
Koz chun Anub le Zobe’bah toh ahingin, chule Harum chapa Ahar’hel insung mite chengse chu ahingin ahi.
Jabez hi asopite dang dang sanga agunche jeh-in anun jong, “Ama hi nat genthei chung nunga kahin ahi,” tin amin Jabez asah-in ahi.

Jabez kitipa hi Israel Pathen henga ataovin hitin aseiye, “O Pathen, nangin keima phatthei neiboh tei teiyin lang, kagamsung jeng jong neikeh let peh tan, chutengle nakhut in neikaile jing jengin, iman eisuhset louna dingin nangman neiching jing jengin!” a tin ahi. Hichun hiche ataona hi Pathenin anop peh tai.
Shuhah sopipa Chelub chun Mehir anahingin, Mehir hin Eshton anahingin ahi.
Eshton hin Bethra’pha le Pase’ah toh, chule Ima’ hash pa Tehin’nah chu anahingin ahi. Mi hichengse chu Recah mi ahiuve.
Kenaz chapa teni chu Oth’ni-el le Sera’iah ahilhone; chule Oth’ni-el chapa teni chu Hathath le Meo’nothai ahilhone.
Meo’nothai chun Ophrah anahingin, chule Sera’iah hin Ge-har’ashim pa Jo’ab chu anahingin ahi; amaho hi mi khut them thing thembol mi ahiuvin ahi.
Jephun’neh chapa Caleb chapate chu Iru le Elah toh chule Na’am ahiuve; chutengle Elah chapa chu Kenaz ahi.
Jehal’lelel chapate chu Ziph le Ziphah toh, Tir’i-a le As’arel ahiuve.

Ezrah chapate chu Jether ahin, Mered ahin, Epher ahin, chule Jalon ahiuve. Mihem hijat chu Mered kitipan akichenpi Pharaoh chanu Bith’i-ah kitinu chapate ahiuve; chujouvin jong amanu hi ahung gai kit’in Miriam jong ahingin, chuin Sham’mai ahingin, chule Eshtemo’a pa Ishbah jong anahingin ahi.
Chujongle ajinu Judah numeinu chun Gedor pa Jered jong anahingin, Soco pa Heber jong anahingin, Zano’ah pa Jeku’thiel kitipa jong anahingin ahi.
Naham sopinu Hodi’ah jinu chapate chu Kei’lah le Garm mite chule Eshtemo’a mi Ma’ac’ath miho pate ho chu anahiuvin ahi.
Shimon chapate chu Amnon le Rinnah toh Benha’nan le Tilon ahiuve. Ishi chapa teni chu Zoheth le Ben-zoheth ahilhone.
Judah chapa Shelah chapate chu Lecah pa Er le Mare’shah pa La’adah toh, chule Bethashbe’a khoa tupat pon khonga pang insung mite toh,
Jokim le Coze’ba mite toh, Jo’ash jong Saraph jong ahiuvin, Saraph hi Moab gamsunga vaipon anapangin, Lehem khoa ahung kile kit’in, tun athusim kisutna lekhaho jong khanglui laiya peh ahisoh tai.
Mi hijat hi bel denga pang ho, Neta’im kho le Gede’rah khoa cheng ho jeng ahiuve; hichea hi amaho hi lengpa chutoh cheng khom ‘uva, ama natonga pang ji ahiuve.
Simeon chapate chu Nem’u-el le Jamin toh, Jarib le Zerah toh, Sha’ul ahiuve;
Sha’ul chapa chu Shallum ahin, Shallum chapa Mibsam ahin, Mibsam chapa Mishma ahi.
Mishma cha le atute chu, achapa Ham’mu-el ahin, Ham’mu-el chapa Zac’cur ahin, Zac’cur chapa Shim’e-i ahi.

Shim’e-i hin chapa jeng jeng som le gup ahingin, chanu gup ahinge; asopi pasal dangin vang hitobanga ama bang hin cha hijat hi anei pouvin, ainsung mite mong mong jong Judah bang hin apung thei pouve.
Amaho hi Beer-sheba le Mo’ladah, Ha’zar-shu’al dunga achenguvin,
Bilhah le Ezem, Tolad dunga jong achengun,
Bethu’elle Hormah a jong chule Ziklag a jong achengun,
Beth-mar’caboth le Ha’zarsu’sim, Beth-biri le Sha-ara’im a jong achenguve. David lengvaipoa ahung pan masanga kho hijat’a hi amaho jeng anacheng ahiuve.
Chule akhoneo dung jouseu chu Etam le A’in toh, Rimmon le Tochen toh, chule Ashan pumin kholhing cheh nga ahi.

Akhobah chengse kholen hicheng kimvel dunga kisadoh chengse chutoh Ba’al mun chan geiyin akigol lhungpeh-in ahi. Hichengse hi amaho chenna mun ho chu ahin, amaho hin khanggui kisimna lekhabu phatah anei uvin ahi.
Mesho’bab le Jamlech toh chule Amazi’ah chapa Joshah toh ahiuvin,
Joel le Joshibi’ah chapa Jehu ahin, Sera’iah chapa ahin, As’i-el chapa ahin,
EJi-o-e’nai ahin, Ja’ako’bah ahin, Jeshohai’ah ahin, Asa’iah ahin, Adi-el ahin, Jesim’i-el ahin, Bena’iah ahin,
chule Shiphi chapa Ziza ahin, Shiphi hi Allon chapa ahin, Allon chu Jeda’iah chapa ahin, Jeda’iah chu Shimri chapa ahin, Shimri chu Shemai’ah chapa ahi;
tua amin cheh a kisimdoh ho hi ama ama insung kailhah cheh a haosa chapa cheh ahiuvin; apu apau insung dungjui cheh injong nasa tah-in aphathei uvin akhangtou thei lheh jenguve.
Amaho hi Gedor kotphung geiyin akitol’uvin, phaicham gama niso lam geiyin jong acheuvin, akelngoi hon teu din hamhing um umna ahol leuvin ahi;
hikoma chun amahon gam pha tah, hamhing thalhinna gam, gam lentah le chamlenna, lung mong tah a chenna thei akimuuve. Ijeh-inem itileh agama anacheng masa mite chu Ham son achilhahte anahiuvin ahi.

Hiche amin cheh a kijih doh ho hi hikoma hin Judah lengpa Hezeki’ah lengvaipoh laiyin ahung lut’uvin, hikoma anachengte ponbuh ho ahin, achen nau in ho ahin amuphah phah asumang uvin ahi. Hiti hin amaho chu asuhmang phat’uvin amaho khel’in anachenguvin, tuni gei hin amaho mun alo nalaiyuve. Ijeh-inem itileh hiche gama hi akelngoiteu neh ding hamhing pha amu u ahi.

Chuin alah uva mi phabep, Simeon mite lah a mihem ja nga tobang chu Se’ir molsang geiyin akitol’uvin, alamkai diuvin Pelati’ ah le Ne’ari’ah toh, Ishi chapa teni Repha’iah le Uz’ziel chu anapansah uvin ahi;
chujongle amaho hin Ama’lek mi ajamdoh a athimoh chengse jong asumang uvin, amaho khel’in tuni geiyin acheng den tauve.

Reuben chapate simna din; Reuben Israel cha masapen ahinan, ahivangin aman apa jalkhun asuh-thang jeh chun aupat hi Israel chapa Joseph chapate joh achanguvin, hijeh chun ama Reuben kitipa hi khanggui kisimna lekhabua chun apen masah dungjuiyin akijih lut tapoi;
Judah jong chu asopite lah a athahat pen a apan a chule ama phunga kona leng khat ahung kisep doh jeng vangin, upatna kiti hi Joseph bou achangin ahi.
Hijeh chun Israel chapa apeng masapen Reuben chapate chu Hanoch ahin, Pallu ahin, Hezron ahin, chule Carmi ahi.
Joel chapate ahileh: Jo’el chapa Shemai’ah ahin, Shemai’ah chapa Gog ahin, Gog chapa Shim’e-i ahin,
Shim’e-i chapa Micah ahin, Micah chapa Re-a’iah ahin, Re-a’iah chapa Ba’al ahin,
Ba’al chapa Be-er’ah ahin, Be-er’ah hi Assiyria lengpa Til’gath-pilne’ser chun soh-changa ana kaimang ahi; ama hi Reuben chapate lah a haosa khat anahi.
Chule ama phung sunga ainkote chu akhangguiyu akisimtoh a akijih toh tengleh ahaosa chu Jei’el ahin, chule Zechari’ah jong ahi;
chule Azaz chapa Bela ahin, Azaz chu Shema chapa ahin, Shema chu Jo’el chapa ahin, amaho hi Aro’er khoa Nebo chan gei, Ba’al-me’on geiya cheng ahiuve.
Ama hi niso lama jong anachengin, nelgam jotna lampi lang, Euphrates lui pi gal hilam geiyin anachengin ahi; ijeh-inem itileh Gilead gama chun aganchau apung lheh jengin ahi.
Saul nikho laiyin jong amaho hin Hagar mite chunga gal abol’uvin, hiche Hagar mite chu ajo phat’uvin Gilead niso lama amaho ponbuh jousea chun alhung keiyin achenden lo tauvin ahi.
Gad son achilhah mite jong chu amaho hitoh kigalsaiyin achenguvin, Bashan gamsunga achenguvin Sal’ecah chan geiyin alouve.
Jo’el hi Bashan khoa haosan apangin, Shapham ama bana apangin, amani ban a Ja’nai le Shaphat ahilhone.
Aphung sunguva mite chu ainsung dungjuiya akisim leh: Michael ahin, Meshul’lam ahin, Sheba ahin, Jo’rai ahin, Jacan ahin, Zi’a ahin, chule Eber pumin mi sagi alhinguvin ahi.

Pasal hijat hi Huri chapa Ab’ihail chapa jeng ahiuve; Huri chu Jaro’ah chapa ahin, Jaro’ah chu Gilead chapa ahin, Gilead chu Michael chapa ahin, Michael chu Jeshish’ai chapa ahin, Jeshish’ai chu Jahdo chapa ahin chule Jahdo chu Buz chapa ahi;
Ahi chu Ab’di-el chapa ahin, Ab’di-el chu Guni chapa ahin chule Guni hi apu apauteu insung lhah a haosa ahi.
Amaho hi Gilead gam le Bashan gam, agamsung dunga kholen dung jousea achenguvin, Sharon gam hamhing phatna lai jousea achengun agamsung akhah khongsoh hel’uve.
Mihem hijat khanggui thusim hi Judah lengpa Jotham lal lai le Israel lengpa Jerobo’am lal laiya kisimtoh a kijih doh ahiye.

Reuben chapate leh Gad chapate chule Manas’seh phung keh khat jong hin gal-hang mihat, pho le chemjam thoa pang thei, thalpi kap them, galsat themtah tah, sepai sang som li le sang ni toh, ja sagi le som gup jen galbol dia gonsa anei jinguvin ahi.
Amaho hin Hagar mite chung le Jetur chung, Naphish le Nodab chunga gal abol’uve;

amahon panpi amube kit phat’uvin Hagar mite leh amaho panpi chengse chu akhut’uva akipe lut soh tauve; ijeh inem itileh gal laiya hi amaho Pathen henga atao uva ahileh, amahon Pathen tahsanna anei jeh-uva a man jong ataonau asanpeh ahitai.

Chutengle akisatpi teu kivahna chengse akipoh uvin, asangongsao u jong sang som nga jen akikaiyun, kelngoi sang ja ni le sang som nga toh, sangan sang ni toh, mihem sang ja khat jen ahingin akaiyun ahi.
Gal kisat chu Pathenin apanpi jeh-in mihem simsen lou akijam chap jengin ahi. Soh-changa akitol mang kah seuvin amaho gamsunga hin acheng tauve.
Manas’seh phung keh khat jong chu agamsunga hin achenguvin, mihem atam lheh jenguvin, Bashan gama pat Ba’al-her’mon gei, Senir gei, chule Her-mon molsang geiyin achengdoh peh jeng-uvin ahi.

Ama ama pajang lhah ain-sung cheh-uva aupa chengse chu: Epher ahin, Ishi ahin, Eli’el ahin, Az’ri-el ahin, Jeremiah ahin, Hodavi’ah ahin, chule Jah’di-el toh ahiuve, mihat gal-hang ho le mi minthang ho toh, ama ama insung pajang lhah a aupa chengse chutoh ahithauvin ahi.
Ahivangin amaho hin apu apateu Pathen ahou khel’uvin, ama-ho masanga Pathenin asuhmangsa mitin agama vaipiho pathen lim semthu doi ahouvun, athang adol’in achon’uvin notin a pang gamtauve.

Hichejeh hin Pathenin Assyria lengpa Pul le Assyria lengpa Til-gath-pilne’ser lungthim ahintildoh peh lhonin, hiche Reuben mite leh Gad mite chule Manas’seh phung akeh khat hi akaimangin, Halah kho le Habor kho, Hara kho, chule Gozan vadunga ahinkai lut’uvin, tuni geiyin aumden tauve.
Levi chapate chu Gershom ahin, Kohath ahin, chule Merar’i ahiuve.
Kohath chapate chu Amram ahin. Izhar ahin, Hebron ahin chule Uz’ziel ahiuvin ahi.
Amram chate chu Aaron le Mose toh chule Miriam ahiuve. Aaron chapate chu Nadab le Abi’hu toh, Elea’zar le Ith’amar ahiuve.
Eliea’zar hin Phin’ehas anahingin, Phin’ehas hin Abisu’a anahin-ge;
Abishu’a hin Bukki ahingin, Bukki’n Uzzi ahinge;
Uzzi’n Zerahi’ah ahingin, Zerahi’ah hin Mera’ioth ahinge;
Mera’-ioth hin Amari’ah ahingin, Amari’ah hin Ahi’tub ahinge;
Ahi’tub hin Zadok ahingin, Zadok chun Ahim’a-az ahinge;
Ahim’a-az hin Azari’ah ahingin, Azari’-ah chun Joha’nan ahinge;
chule Joha’nan hin Azari’ah chu ahingin, ama hi Jerusalem khopia Solomon houin sah-doh sunga thempua hung pang ahi.
Azari’ah hin Amari’ah ahingin, Amari’ah chun Ahitub ahinge;
Ahi’tub hin Zadok ahingin, Zadok chun Shallum ahinge;
Shallum hin Hilki’ah ahingin, Hilki’ah chun Azari’ah ahinge;
Azari’ah hin Sera’iah ahingin, Sera’iah chun Je-hoz’adak ahingin ahi;
Pakaiyin Judah gam mite leh Jerusalem mite soh-changa asol manga Nebuchadnez’zar khut’a atolmang sah phat’in Jehoz’adak jong hi soh-changin achemang tan ahi.
Levi chapate chu Gershom le Ko-hath toh chule Merar’i ahi, tin akiseitai.
Gershom chapa teni min chu Libni le Shim’e-i ahilhone.
Kohath chapate chu Amram le Izhar toh, Hebron le Uzziel ahi, tin akiseitai.
Merar’i chapa teni chu Mahli le Mushi ahilhone. Hicheng hi apu apau kailhah cheh ama ama in sung dol cheh a Levi miho insung jeng ahiuve.
Gershom insung ahileh, Gershom chapa Libni ahin, Libni chapa Jahath ahin, Jahath chapa Zimmah ahi;
Zimmah chapa Jo’ah ahin, Jo’ah chapa Iddo ahi; Iddo chapa Zerah ahin, Zerah chapa Je-ath’erai ahi.
Kohath chapate lah a hin Kohath chapa Ammin’adab ahin, Ammin’adab chapa Korah ahin, Korah chapa Assir ahi.
Assir chapa Elka-nah ahin, Elka’nah chapa Ebi’-asaph ahi; Abi’asaph chapa Assir ahin,
Assir chapa Tahath ahi; Tahath chapa Uri’el ahin, Uri’el chapa Uzzi’ah ahin, chule Uzzi’ah chapa Sha’ul ahi.
Elka’-nah chapa teni chu Ama’sai le Ahi’-moth ahilhone:
achapa chu Elka’nah ahin, Elka’nah chapa Zophai ahin, Zo-phai chapa Nahath ahi;
Nahath chapa Eli’ab ahin, Eli’ab chapa Jero’ham ahin, Jero’ham chapa Elka’nah ahi.
Samuel chapa te nichu apeng masa Jo’el ahin, ani-lhin napa chu Abi’jah ahi.
Metar’i cha-pate chu Mahli ahin, Mahli chapa Libni ahin, Libni chapa Shim’e-i ahin, Shim’e-i chapa Uzzah ahi;
Uzzah chapa Shim’-e-a ahin, Shim’e-a chapa Haggi’ah ahi; chule Haggi’ah chapa chu Asa’iah ahin ahi.
Pakai houin sunga Pathen thingkong ahung kitol lut nunga David’in houin sunga la lamkaiya pang dia anganse miho chu hicheng hi ahiuve.

Jerusalem khopia Solomon in Pakai houin asah doh masangsen La lamkaiya pang ho hi kikhopna ponbuh a la lamkaiyin anapang uvin lhacha na a tong jinguve; hitobang hin amahon atoh dingdol kinu chu hoikeichan atong jing jenguve.
Hichea la lamkaiya pang ho leh achapateu chu aban a kisei ho hi ahiuve. Kohath chilhah miho lah a: Jo’el chapa lathempa Heman ahin, Jo’el chu Samuel chapa ahin,
Samuel chu Elka’nah chapa ahin, Elka’nah chu Jero’ham chapa ahi; Jero’ham chu Eli’el chapa ahin, Eli’el chu To’ah chapa ahi;
To’ah chu Zuph chapa ahin, Zuph chu Elka’nah chapa ahi; Elka’nah chu Mahath chapa ahin, Mahath chu Ama’sai chapa ahi.
Ama’sai chu Elka’nah chapa ahin, Elka’nah chu Jo’el chapa ahi; Jo’el chu Azari’ah chapa ahin, Azari’ah chu Zephani’ah chapa ahi;
Zephani’ah chu Tahath chapa ahin, Tahath chu Assir chapa ahi; Assir chu Ebi’asaph chapa ahin, Ebi’asaph chu Korah chapa ahi;
Korah chu Izhar chapa ahin, Izhar chu Kohath chapa ahi; Kohath chu Levi chapa ahin, Levi chu Israel chapa ahi;
chule asopipa Asaph, amanchah phapeh tah a pangpa amin Asaph kitipa chu Berechi’ah chapa ahin, Berechi’ah chu Shim’e-a chapa ahi;
Shim’e-a hi Michael chapa ahin, Michael chu Ba’asei’ah chapa ahi; Ba-ase’iah chu Malehi’jah chapa ahin,
Malehi’jah chu Ethni chapa ahi; Ethni chu Zerah chapa ahin, Zerah -chu Ada’iah chapa ahi;
Ada’iah chu Ethan chapa ahin, Ethan chu Zimmah chapa ahi; Zimmah chu Shim’e-i chapa ahin,
Shim’e-i chu Jahath chapa ahi; Jahath chu Gershom chapa ahin, Gershom chu Levi chapa ahi.
Akhut veilama pangchu asopite Merar’i chapate ahiuve: Ethan chu Kishi chapa ahin Kishi chu Abdi chapa ahi; Abdi chu Malluch chapa ahin,
Malluch chu Hashabi’ah chapa ahi; Hashabi’ah chu Amazi’ah chapa ahin, Amazi’ah chu Hilki’ah chapa ahi;
Hilki’ah chu Amzi chapa ahin, Amzi chu Bani chapa ahi; Bani chu Shemer chapa ahin,
Shemer chu Mahli chapa ahi; Mahli chu Mushi chapa ahin, Mushi chu Merar’i chapa ahi; chule Merar’i chu Levi chapa ahin ahiye;
amaho sopite Levi phung sung mite jouse chu abonchauvin Pathen houin houbuh sunga natong kinbol din akipansah soh keiyuvin ahi.

Aaron le achapate chu pumgo thilto kigo-na maicham chung le gimnamtui kihalvamna maicham chunga thilto ding jouse tohdoh-in apanguvin, muntheng phunga natohna ding thiltoh din apanguve, chujongleh Pathen lhachapa Mose thupeh dungjuiyin Israelte kithoina bol’in apangjiuve.
Aaron chapate chu hicheng hi ahiuve: Aaron chapa chu Elea’zar ahin, Elea’zar chapa chu Phin’ehas ahi; Phin’ehas chapa chu Abishu’a ahin,
Abishu’a chapa chu Bukki ahi; Bukki chapa chu Uzzi ahin, Uzzi chapa chu Zerahi’ah ahi;
Zeraili’ah chapa chu Mera’ioth ahin, Mera’ioth chapa chu Amari’ah ahi; Amari’ah chapa chu Ahi’tub ahin,
Ahi’tub chapa chu Zadok ahi; chule Zadok chapa chu Ahim’a-az ahiye.
Hichengse hi amaho gamgi hop sunga achenna mun chengseu chu ahiye: Aaron chapate Kohath phung sung mite dinga phun kisan chu aphat jeh-in
mihon amaho chu Judah gamsunga Hebron khopi le akimvel gamse se toh chule avela hamhing gam gancha vahna ding jouse chutoh apeh tha tauve;
amavang akhopi loujao lah chengse leh akhoneo dung jouse chu Caleb kitipa Jephun’neh chapa chu apetauve.

Aaron chapate dinga kiselna hoidohna khopi apeh hou chu: Hebron khopi le Libnah khopi toh chule ahamhing gamsungse toh ahin. Jattir khopi le Eshtemo’a khopi toh chule ahamhing gamsungse chutoh apeh thauvin ahi;
Hilen khopi le ahamhing gamsungse toh ahin, Debir khopi le ahamhing gamsungse toh ahi;
Ashan khopi le ahamhing gamsungse ahin, chule Bethshemesh khopi le ahamhing gamsungse ahi;

Benjamin phunga kona alahdoh-u khopi ho chu Geba khopi le ahamhing gamsungse toh ahin, Al’emeth le ahamhing gamsung chengse toh ahi; chujongle An’athoth khopi le agamsung hamhing gamse se toh ahin ahi. Amau phunga ainsung pumpiuva achan jat’u khopi chu abonchan khopi som le khopi thum alhingin ahi.
Kohath chapate amoh chengse din amau insung dinga phun aphatna dungjuiyin, Manas’seh phung keh khat, hiche phung keh’ khat a kon, hichea phunga kon chun khopi som khat jen akipen ahi.

Gershom chate ainsungu toh kithuh bep’a kipea khopi chu khopi som le thum alhingin, hiche khopi ho hi Is’sachar phung le Asher phung Naph’tali phung, chule Bashan gama Manas’seh phunga kona kidong khom ahi.
Merari chate jong ainsungu dungjuiya a akithuh bep akipen, hicheng hi Reuben phunga kon le Gad phunga kon, chule Zebulun phunga kona kidong khom kitma ahi.
Hitobang hin Israel chaten Levite chu khopi chujat chutoh ahamhing gamsese toh anapeuvin ahiye.
Hitobang hin phun phatna dungjuiyin Judah phunga kon le Simeon phunga kon, chule Benjamin phunga konin amin cheh a kisei khopi ho hi anapeuvin ahi.
Kohath chapate insung mi phabep jong Ephra’im phunga konin agamsung uva khopi phabep achanguvin ahi.
Amaho anapeh-u kiselna hoidohna khopi ho chu: Shechem le ahamhing gamsungse se ahin, akhopi hi Ephraim thing lhang gamsunga ahi; Gezer le ahamhing gamsungse se ahin,
Jok’me-am le ahamhing gamsungse sea hi; Beth-ho’ron khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se ahin.
Ai’jalon khopi le ahamhing gamsungse sea hi: Gath-rim’mon le ahamhing gamsungse se ahin.

chule Manas’seh phung keh khat’ a koninjong Aner khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se ahi: chule Bil’c-am khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se ahin, hichengse chu Kohath insung mite amoh chengse dinga kipe ahitai.
Manas’seh phung keh khat’a kona Gershom insung mite kipe khopi ho Bashan gamsunga Golan khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se ahin, chule Ash’taroth khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se a hi:
Is’sachar phunga kona kipedoh khopi ho chu: Kedesh le ahamhing gamsungse se ahin, Dab’erath le ahamhing gamsungse se ahi;
Ramoth khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se ahin, chule Anem le ahamhing gamsungse se ahi;
Asher phunga kona kipedoh khopi ho chu: Mashal le ahamhing gamsungse se ahin, Abdon le ahamhing gamsungse se ahi;
Hukok le ahamhing gamsungse se ahin, chule Rehob le ahamhing gamsungse se ahi;

Naph’tali phunga kona kipedoh khopi ho chu: Galilee gamsunga Kedesh khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se ahin, Ham’mon khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se ahi; chujongle Kiriatha’im le ahamhing gamsungse se jong ahin ahi.
Merar’i chate amoh chengse chu Zeb’ulun phunga konin akipen: Rim’mono khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se ahin, Tabor khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se ahi;

chutengle Jordan vadung gal lang Jericho khopi dunga, Jordan kat niso lam, Reuben phunga konin akipen: Bezer khopi le ahamhing gamsung sese ahin, gammang lah a khopi khat ahi; Jahzah khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se ahin,
Ked’emoth khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se ahi; chule Meph’a ath khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se ahin,
chutengleh Gad phunga kona kipedoh khopi chu: Gilead gamsunga Ramoth khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se ahin, Mahana’im le ahamhing gamsungse se ahi;
Heshbon khopi le ahamhing gamsungse se ahin, chule Jazer khopi leh ahamhing gamsungse se ahi.
Issachar din achapate mi li ahiuvin, amaho chu Tola le Pu’ah toh, Jashub le Shimron ahiuve.

Tola chapate chu Uzzi le Repha’iah toh, Je’ri-el le Jahmai toh, Ibsam le Shem’uel ahiuvin, apau Tola insung kon mite lah a upa cheh ahiuve; amau insunga amaho hi gal-hang mihat jeng ahiuvin, David lal laiyin sepai sang som ni le sang ni toh jagup alhinguvin ahi.
Uzzi chapa chu Izrahi’ah ahi. Chule Izrahi’ah chapate chu Michael le Obadi’ah toh, Jo’el le Isshi’ah pumin mi nga alhinguve.

Ama lamkaina hin ama ama khang sunga apajang lhah dungjui cheh chule galsat thei sepai kisimdoh dungjuiyin sepai hon tampi ahiuvin, sang som thum le sang gup ahiuvin, amaho hin numei ji tampi le chapa tamtah aneiyuvin ahi.
Ainko keiyuvin Is’sachar insung mite mong mong chu abonchauva akisim’uva ahileh gal-hang mihat jeng jeng jong sang somget le sagi alhinguvin, hicheng chu akhanggui lekhauva kijih lut’ah ahitai.
Benjamin chapate chu Bela le Becher toh, chule Jedi’a-el pumin mi thum alhinguvin ahi.

Bela chapate chu Ezbon le Uzzi toh, Uz’ziel le Jer’imoth toh chule Iri pumin mi nga ahiuve. Mi nga hi amau insung apu apau lhah a phung upa cheh ahiuvin, mihat gal-hang cheh ahiuve; chujongle akhangguiyu kisimna akisut dol chun sepai sang som ni le sang ni toh, som thum le li alhinguvin ahi.
Becher chapate chu Zemi’rah le Jo’ash toh, Elie’zer le Eli-o-e’nai toh, Omri le Jer’emoth toh, Abi’jah le An’athoth toh, chule Al’emeth ahiuve. Mihem hicheng chu abonchauva Becher chapate jeng ahi.
Amaho hi akhangguiyu kisim dungjui le akhangu kitol dungjui, apu apateu lhah a insung upa chengse le mihat gal-hang se se chu mihem sang som ni le ja ni ahiuve.
Jedi’a-el chapa Bilhan ahi; Bilhan chapate chu Je’ush le Benjamin toh, Ehud le Chena’anah toh, Zethan le Tarshish toh chule Ahish’ahar ahiuve.
Mihem hicheng hi Jedi’a-el cha le atute jeng ahiuvin, apu apateu insung dungjuiya mihat gal-hang kisimdoh chengse le aupateu chu agomin galbol thei cheh sang som le sang sagi toh ja ni alhinguve.
Ir chapa teni chu Shuppim le Huppim ahilhonin, Hushim chu apa Aher ahi.
Naph’tali chapate chu Jah’zi-el le Guni toh, Jezer le Shallum ahiuvin, Bilhah hinsa cheh ahiuvin ahi.
Manas’seh chapa chu As’ri-el ahin, ama hi athaikemnu Aramea numei nun ahinpeh ahi; amanu hin Gilead hingpa Machir jong chu ahinge.
Machir hin Huppim le Shuppim jong ji apuipeh cheh-e; chule asopinu min Ma’acah ahi. Ani lhinna nu min chu Zeloph’ehad ahi; Zeloph’ehad hin chanu phabep ahinge.
Ma’acah Machir jinu chun chapa khat ahingin amin jong Peresh asah-e; chule asopipa min chu Sheresh akitin ahi; chujongle achapa teni min Ulam le Rakem ahilhone.
Ulam chapa chu amin Bedan ahi. Hicheng hi Manas’seh tupa, Machir chapa Gilead chapate ahiuve.
Asopinu Hammo’lecheth kitinu chun Ishhod le Abie’zer toh, chule Mahlah ahingin ahi.
Shemi’da chapate chu Ahi’an le Shechem toh chule Likhi le Ani’am ahiuve.
Ephraim chapa le atute chu: Ephraim chapa Shuthe’lah ahin, Shuthe’lah chapa Bered ahi; Bered chapa Tahath ahin, Tahath chapa Ele-a’dah ahi; Ele-a’ dah chapa Tahath ahi kit’in,

Tahath chapa Zabad ahi; Zabad chapa Shuthe’lah akiti kit’in, Shuthe’lah chapa teni chti Ezer le Ele-ad ahilhone; amaho hi agamsunga pengden Gath mihon a that tauvin ahi; ijeh-inem itileh amaho chu aganchau lahpeh dinga hung konsuh jeng ahiuve.
Apau Ephraim chun nikho tamtah sungin amaho pul adou dou jengin, alhem lung mong din asopite jong ahunguvin ahi.

Chujouvin Ephraim chu ajinu henga agalut kit’in ahileh amanu ahung gaiyin chapa khat ahing kit’e; ainsung chunga chutobang hamsetna analhun jeh chun Ephraim in achapa pengthah pa chu amin Beri’ah akisah-in ahi.
Ama hin chanu khat ahingin amin jong She’erah ahin, hiche She’erah kiti nu hin Beth-horon chung nung le anoinung chu anasadoh-in chule Uzzen-she’erah jong anasadoh-e.
Achapa chu Rephah ahin, Rephah chapa chu Resheph ahi, Resheph chapa Telah ahin; chule Telah chapa Tahan ahi;
Tahan chapa chu Ladan ahin, Ladan chapa chu Ammi’hud ahi; Ammi’hud chapa chu Elish’ama ahin,
Elish’ama chapa chu Nun ahi; Nun chapa chu Joshua ahi.

Amaho hin gam alouva achenphau achen mun u chu Bethel khopi le agamsunga kholen dom jouse toh, niso lama Na’aran ahin, nilhum lama Gezer le akholen dung jouse jong ahithan, Shechem khopi le akholen len ho jong ahin, chule Ayyah khopi le akholen dungjouse jong a hi thai;

chutengle Manas’seh mite gamgi dunga hung kilhah ahipeh-in, Beth-she’an le akholen dung jouse ahin, Ta’anach le akholen len ho toh, Megiddo khopi leh akholen dung jouse ahi; chule Dor khopi leh akholen dom jouse jong ahiye. Khopi hijat leh kholen len hijat sunga hi Israel chapa Joseph chapate chengse anacheng ahiuve.
Asher chapate chu Imnah le Ishvah toh, Ishvi leh Beri’ah toh chule asopinuu Serah toh ahiuve.
Beri’ah chapa teni chu Heber le Mal’chi-el ahilhonin; Mal’chi-el hi Bir’zaith pa ahiye.
Heber hin Japhlet ahingin, Shomer le Hotham toh chule asopinu u Shu’a toh ahingin ahi.
Japhlet chapate chu Pasach le Bimhal toh, chule Ashvath ahiuve. Mi hicheng hi Japhlet chapa jeng ahiuvin ahi.
Japhlet sopipa Shemer chapate chu Rohgah le Jehub’bah toh chule Aram ahiuve.
Shemer sopipa Helem chapate chu Zophah le Imna toh, Shelesh le Amal ahiuve.
Zophah chapate chu Su’ah le Har’nepher toh, Shu’al le Beri toh, Imrah ahiuvin,
Bezer jong ahin, Hod jong, Shamma jong, Shilshah jong, Ithran jong, chule Be-era jong ahiuvin ahi.
Jether chapate chu Jephun’neh le Pispa toh, chule Ara ahiuve.
Ulla chapate chu Arah ahin, Han’niel ahin, chule Rizi’a ahi.

Mihem hijat hi Asher phunga mi jeng ahiuvin, apajang khai cheh a phung upa jeng ahi; chujongle mihat gal-hang mi jeng leh milen milal jeng ahiuve, ti phatea phot chetsa cheh ahitauve. Akhanggui lekhubua galsat a man thei cheh mihing kisimdoh chengse chu sang som ni le sang gup alhinguvin ahi.
Benjamin chun achapa apeng masapen Bela ahingin, achapa ni lhinna Ashbel ahingin, athum lhinna Ahar’ah ahin, chule
Nohah chu li lhinna ahin, chutengle Rapha chu nga lhinna ahitai.
Bela chapate chu Addar le Gera toh, Abi’hud toh,
Abishu’a toh, Na’aman toh, Aho’ah toh ahiuvin,
Gera, le Shephu phan chule Huram toh ahiuve.
Mi hicheng hi Ehud chapate ahiuvin, Geba gama cheng mite dinga ainsung cheh uva mi upa jeng ahiuvin, abonchauvin Mana’hath gamsunga min soh-chang din akaimang tauve.
Amaho chu Na’aman ahin, Ahi’jah le Gera toh ahin, Gera hin soh-changa apui mangu ahi; amahin Uzza le Ahi’hud anahingin ahi.
Amapa hin aji teni Hushim le Ba’ara ada nungin jong Moab phaiya chun Shahara’im ahing kit nalaiyin ahi.
Chujongle ajinu Hodesh kiti nu chuto jong chapa Jobab le Zibi’a toh, Mesha le Malcam ahing lhonin,
Je’uz le Sachi’a toh, chule Mirmah ahing lhonin ahi. Hicheng hi amapa chapate ahiuvin ainsung cheh uva mi upa cheh ahiuve.
Aman ajinu Hushim tojong chapa ni ahing lhonin, Abi’tub le Elpa’al ahilhone.
Elpa’al chapate chu Eber ahin, Misham ahin, Shemed ahi; Shemed hin Ono khopi le Lod khopi toh chule akholen dung jouse anasan ahi;
chule Beri’ah le Shema jong ahilhonin, Aijalon khopia chenga Gath a cheng ho to kisat a pang miho lah a ama ni chu insung phung upa cheh ahilhone;
chujongle Ahi’o le Shashak toh chule Jeremoth jong ahiuve.
Zebadi’ah le Arad, Eder,
Michael, Ishpah, chule Joha, amaho hi Beri’ah chapate jeng ahiuve.
Zebadi’ah, Meshul’lam, Hizki, Heber,
Ish’merai, Izli’ah, chule Jobab chu Elpa’al chapate ahiuvin ahi.
Jakim, Zichri, Zabdi,
Eli-e’nai, Zil’le-thai, Eli’el,
Adai’ah, Bera’iah chule Shimrath hicheng hi Shim’e-i chapate jeng hiuve.
Ishpan, Eber, Eli’el,
Abdon, Zichri, Hanan,
Hanani’ah, Elam, Anthothi’ajh,
Iphde’iah chule Penu’el hicheng hi Shashak chapate ahiuvin ahi.
Sham’sherai, Shehari’ah, Athali’ah,
Ja areshi’ah, Elijah, chule Zichri hicheng hi Jero’ham chapate jeng ahi.
Mi hijat hi aphunguva akhang che dungjuiya ama ama pajang lhah insung cheh a mi upa jeng, haosa jeng ahiuvin ahi. Amaho hi Jerusalem khopia anacheng uvin ahiye.
Gibeon khopia chun Gibeon pa Jeri’el anachengin, ajinu chu amin Ma’acah ahi.
Achapa apeng masapen Abdon, a ban a Zur, Kish, Ba’al, Nadab,
Gedor, Ahi’o, Zecher,
chule Mikloth ahin, ama hi Shim’e-ah hingpa apa ahiye. Mi hijat jong chu ainkoteu toh kigalsai cheh-in Jerusalem khopia chun acheng uvin, ainkote toh acheng khom’uvin ahi.
Ner chun Kish ahingin, Kish chun Saul ahingin, Saul’in Jonathan ahingin, Mal’chishu’a le Abin’adab toh, chule Eshba’al jong ahinge;
Jonathan chapa chu Mer’ib-ba’al ahin, Mer’ib-ba’al hin Micah ahinge.
Micah chapate chu Pithon, Melech, Tare’a, chule Ahaz ahiuve.
Ahaz hin Jeho’addah ahingin, chule Jeho’addah hin Al’emeth le Az’maveth toh, chule Zimri ahingin; Zimri hin Moza ahing kit’in ahi.
Moza hin Bin’e-a ahingin; Bin’e-a chapa chu Raphah ahin, Raphah chapa chu Ele-a’sah ahi; Ele-a’sah chapa chu Azel ahiye.
Azel hin chapa gup ahingin, amaho chu aminu anoiya kisei cheng hi ahiuve: Azri’kam, Bo’cheru, Ish’mael, She-ari’ah, Obadi’ah, chule Hanan ahiuve. Mi hijat hi Azel chapate jeng ahiuvin ahi.
Asopipa Eshek chapa chu apeng masapen Ulam ahin, ani lhin na pa Je’ush ahi; chule Eliph’elet chu athum lhinna ahitai.

Ulam chapate chu mihat gal-hang jeng, thalpi kap them jeng ahiuvin, chapa jong tampi pi aneiyuvin, tute jong tamtah aneiyui; mihem ja khat le som nga jen ahiuvin, aboncha chu Benjamin phunga mi jeng ahiuvin ahi.

Israelte chu abonchauvin akhang guiyu akisim soh keiyin, akisimdoh jouse chu Israel lengte thusim lekhabua akijih lut soh keiye. Judah miten kitah louna anei jeh-uvin Babylon gamsunga soh-changin min akaimang tauve.
Agamsung uva hunglut kit’a akhopi dunguva hung cheng lut masajo chu Israelte le thempuho, Levi miho leh houin lhacha ho ahiuve.
Judah mite lah a abang bang, Benjamin phunga ahin, Ephraim phunga ahin, chule Manas’seh phunga ahiuvin, Jerusalem khopia achenguve.
Judah chapa Perez chapate lah a konin Bani ahin, achapa Imri ahin, Imri chapa Omri ahin, Omri chapa Ammi’hud ahin, Ammi’hud chapa Uthai ahi.
Chule Shilon mite lah a jong achapa apeng masapen Asa’iah le achapate chengse ahiuve.
Zerah chapate lah a Jeu’elle ainkote chengse ahiuvin, mihem jagup le somko alhinguvin ahi.
Benjamin chapate lah a Meshul’lam chapa Sallu ahin, Sallu chapa Hodavi’ah ahin, Hodavi’ah chapa Hassenu’ah ahi.
Jero’ham chapa Ibne’iah ahin, chule Elah chu Uzzi chapa. Michri chapa ahin, chule Meshul’lam jong chu Shephati’ah chapa ahi; Shephati’ah chu Reu’el chapa ahin, Reu’el chu Ibni’jah chapa ma ahi;

chutengle amaho hi ainko chengseu akhanggui dungjuiy uva akisimdoh a ahileh mihem ja ko le som nga le gup alhinguve. Mi hicheng hi apu apauva ama ama insung lhah dungjui cheh a phung upa cheh ahiuvin ahi.
Thempuho lah a Jeda’iah le Jehoi’arib toh chule Jachin ahiuvin;

Azari’ah kitipa Hilki’ah chapa jong chu ahin, hiche Hilki’ah hi Meshul’lam chapa ahi; Meshul’lam chu Zadok chapa ahin, Zadok chu Mera’ioth chapa ahi; Mera’ioth chu Ahi’tub chapa ahin, Pathen houin a vaibol lamkai pipua pang ahiye;

chule Jero’ham chapa Adai’ah ahin, Jero’ham hi Pashhur chapa ahin, Pashhur chu Malchi’jah chapa ahi; chule Ad’i-el chapa Ma’asai ahin, Ad’icel chu Jah’zerah chapa ahi; Jah ‘zerah chu Meshul’lam chapa ahin, Meshul’lam chu Meshil’lemith chapa ahi; chutengle Meshil’lemith jong chu Immer chapa ahi.

hicheng tilouvin jong amahon inko cheh, apu apauva ainsung kailhah a phung upa chengse pumin Pathen houin sunga thahangsan tah a natonga pang thei cheh mihem sang khat le ja sagi toh somgup anei nalaiyuve.
Levi phunga mite chu Hasshub chapa Shemai’ah ahin, Hasshub chu Azri’kam chapa ahi; Azri’kam chu Hashabi’ah chapa ahin, Hashabi’ah chu Merar’i chapate lah a khat ahi;
chule Bakbak’kar le Heresh toh Galal jong ahin, chutengleh Mica chapa Mattani’ah ahi; Mica chu Zichri chapa ahin, Zichri chu Asaph chapa ahi;

chule Shemai’ah chapa Obadi’ah ahin, Shemai’ah chu Galal chapa ahi; Galal chu Jeduthun chapa ahin, chule Asa chapa Berechi’ah ahi; Berechi’ah chu Elka’nah chapa ahin, ama hi Netoph’ath mite khocha dunga anachengle len ahi.
Kulpi kelkot ngah a pang miho chu: Shallum ahin, Akkub ahin, Talmon ahi; Ahi’man ahin, chule Shallum hi alamkaiyin apangin ainkoteu toh ahiuve;
amaho hi lengpa inkot niso lam kelkot ngah a pang pang jeng ahiuve. Chutengle Levi mite ngahmun kelkot ngah a pang miho chu hicheng hi ahiuvin ahi:

Ko’re chapa Shallum ahin, Ko’re chu Ebi’asaph chapa ahi; Ebi’asaph chu Korah chapa ahin, chule ama inkote apa insung kon Ko’rah insung konse se chu houin kinbol’in apanguvin, ponbuh hongcha ngah-in apanguve; apu apateu jong Pakai ngahmun le kelkot ngah a apan banga pang ahiuve.
Masang laiya chu Elea’zar chapa Phin’ehas kitipa hi amaho chunga vaibol lea ana pang ji ahi; hijeh chun Pakaiyin jong amapa chu anapan pi jing jenge.
Zechari’ah kitipa Meshelemi’ah chapa chu kikhopna ponbuh kotphunga kotngah-in ana pang jin ahi.

Hitia hongcha kelkot dung ngah dinga kilhengdoh miho mong mong chu mihem ja ni le som le ni alhinguvin ahi. Amaho hi akhang guiyu kisimna a akho kho uva kisim soh kei ahiuve. David le mitva neipa Samuel chun amaho hi akitah jeh-uva hitobang apan mun’uva hi anapansah lhon ahiuve.
Hijeh a chu amaho hihen lang acha atuteu hijongleh Pakai houin, ponbuh a houin kelkot phung dung ngah a in-ngah a apansah-u ahiye.
Hiche kelkot dunga kot ngah a pang ho chu niso lam, nilhum lam, sahlam le lhang lama pang soh keiyuva, mun lia pang ahiuvin ahi.
Amaho toh tongkhoma akithopi diuvin ainkoteu, akho mun cheh a hunguva ni sagi gia amaho hi ahung panhu jing jeng diuva um-ah ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh kelkot ngah a pang lamkai cheh mi li, Levi miho chu indan jouse leh Pathen houin sunga thil kikhol jouse ngah a jong pang ahiuve.
Hijeh chun amaho hi Pathen houin kimvela ageh jiuvin, hitia hi amaho chunga in-nga kiti mong mong chu kikoiya, jingkah seh leh kot honga jong pangji ahiuvin ahi.

Alah uva mi abang bang chu houin kinbolna kimangji manchah thil le lo simtoh-in a pang jiuvin ahi; ijeh-inem itileh hitobang thilkeo ho chu akilah doh le akikoi lut chan a simtoh ji ji ngai monga ahi.
Midang ho jong chu thilkeo dang le manchah thil theng ho, chang bongdi le lengpitwi, thaotwi, gimnamtui le adang dang lhutnam ding anamtui ho vetup din apansah uvin ahi.
Thempuho chapate lah jenga jong midang phabep chu lhutnam ding gimnamtui chohhal din jong apansah ui;
Levi miho lah a Mattithi’ah kitipa, Korah insung kon Shallum chapa apeng masapen pa chu changlhah pheng semna din avaibol’in apangin ahi.
Chujongle ainkoteu Kohath insung mite ma ma phabep jong chu cholngah nikho seh le todoh ding changlhah semin apanguvin ahi.

Levi miho lah a apu apau lhah a insung phung upa cheh jong lathem tah tah aumuvin, amaho hi houin sungdan a acheng den jenguvin, houin kinbolna ongthol’in aum theiyuve, ijehinem itileh amaho hi asun ajan a lasa pang pang jengji ahiuvin ahi.
Anoiya kiseiho hi Jerusalem khopia cheng, akhang dungjuiyuva kisimdoh Levi miho apu apauva ainsung lhah cheh a phung upajeng ahiuve.
Gibeon khoa chun Gibeon pa Jei’el chu anachengin, ajinu min jong Ma’acah akiti.
Ama hi achapa peng masapen Abdon ahin, aban a Zur ahi; chuin Kish ahin, Ba’al ahin, Ner ahin, Nadab ahi;
Gedor ahin, Ahi’o ahin, Zechari’ah ahin chule Mikloth ahiye.
Mikloth kitipa hin Shim’e-am anahingin, chujongle amaho jong chu Jerusalem khopia ama ama inkote cheh toh ki-inmai ngatto cheh-in anacheng uve.
Ner hin Kish ahingin, Kish hin Saul ahinge; Saul’in Jonathan ahingin, Malehishu’a ahingin, Abin’adab le Eshba’al jong ahingin ahi.
Jonathan chapa chu Mer’ib’ba’al ahin, chuin Mer’ib’ba’al hin Micah ahinge.
Micah chapate chu Pithon le Melech toh, Tahre’a le Ahaz ahiuvin ahi;
Ahaz hin Jarah ahingin, Jarah hin Al’emeth le Az’maveth toh Zimri ahingin ahi; chuin Zimri hin Moza ahingin,
Moza hin Bin’e-a ahinge; Bin’e-a chapa chu Repha’iah ahin, Repha’iah chapa chu Ele-a’sah ahi; Ele-a’sah chapa chu Azel ahiye.
Azel hin chapa gup jen ahingin, amaho min hiche ho hi ahi: Azri’kam, Bo’cheru, Ish’mael, Sheari’ah, Obadi’ah chule Hanan ahiuve; mihem hijat chu Azel chapate jeng jeng ahiuvin ahi.

Philistine ten Israelte dou nan gal ahinbol tauve; Philistine te masanga Israelte ajam’uvin apang thei tapouvin ahi, chujongle Gilbo’a molsang chunga chun Israelten gal alel’uvin akijam chap tauvin ahi.
Hichea hin Philistine ten Saul le achapate jong ajam nauva apha pauvin, hijeh chun Philistine miten Jonathan le Abin’adab, chule Mal’chishu’a kitite ho Saul chapate geiyin athat tauve.
Saul din jong gal kisat chu adou hah cheh cheh jeng tan, chuin thalpi kapthem mihon ma Saul chu amudoh’ uvin, hijeh chun Saul jeng jong chu hiche thalpi kapthem ho hin melse tah-in amavouvin ahi.

Hichun Saul’in jong agalvonpopa jah a aseiyin, “Nachemjam satdoh jengin lang, neidot pai jengin, achutilouva ahileh hiche cheptanlou mite khu hunguvin tin kichepna einei diu ahitai,” ati. Ahivanginla agalvonpopa anompon aboldeh tapoi; ijeh-inem itileh chuta bol jeng ding chu atija behseh jengin ahi. Hichejeh chun Saul’in jong achemjam akisatdoh jengin, achunga alhun akibahlut jenge.
Hichea hi agalvon popan jong Saul thi amudoh phat’in, ama jong achemjam chunga akibah lut pai jengin athipai pai tai.
Hitobang hin Saul athitan, achapa mi thum le ainsung mite abonchan athi khom cheh tauve.

Hichun phaicham a cheng Israel mipum pin Israel sepaite a jam gamtauvin, Saul le achapate jong athitauve, ti amudoh phat’uvin achen nau khopi jouse adalhauvin ajam gamtauve; chuin Philistine te ahunguvin hiche khopi dunga hin acheng tauve.
Ajing nikhoa Philistine mite chu mithi long lhemdoh a ahunguva ahileh, Saul le achapate chu Gilbo’a molsanga anathiu amudoh tauve.

Hijeh chun amahon jong Saul chu avon ahoh lhauvin, alukhuh le agalvon akilah uvin, amilimdoi houvu leh mitin henga hitobanga Saul athau kipana thu lhangsamle dingin Philistine gamsung pumpia sottolle miho asol soh keitauve.
Chujongle Saul galvon chu apathen lim semthuho houin sunga akhaiyun, alukhuh jong chu Dagon houin sunga atah uvin ahi.
Hichea hin Ja’besh-gil’ead khoa cheng Israelten Philistine ten Saul abolnau ajah doh phat’ uvin,

gal-hang lai jouse akipat’uvin Saul tahsa along le achapate long jouse agapo mang tauve, aboncha chun Jabesh khoa ahinpo lut soh keiyuvin ahi; chu-jongle agubuh jouseu chu Jabesh khopia gangpi phung noiya avuiyun, ni sagi sungin an angol’uvin ahi.
Hitobang tah hin Saul chu akitah loujeh-in athitai; Saul chu Pakai henga kitah loutah-in ana umin, Pakai thupeh anit poi, gaochang mi pou adong len, iti chon ding ham, ti akihilsah len ahi,
Pakai heng joh a che na kihilsah din agopon ahi; hichejeh a chu Pakaiyin ama chu athadoh a, lenggam chu Jesse chapa David joh apeh ahitai.
Israelte abonchauvin Hebron khopia chun David henga ahung kikhom’uvin aseitauve, “Vetan, keiho hi naphe navou kahiuve.

Masanglai, Saul leng chan lai jengin jong Israel lamkaiya vaikon vailhun bolji chu nang bou nahi; chujongle nangma henga Pakai na-Pathen chun naseipeh-in, ‘Nang hin kamite Israel hi kelngoi chin banga nahin chin ding, chule kamite Israel chunga lenga nahung pan ding ahi,’ tin anaseiye,” atiuvin ahi.

Hiti chun Israel mite upa chengse chu Hebron khopia lengpa henga ahung uvin, David jong chun amaho hi toh Pakai angsunga kitepna khat asemin, chuin amahon jong Pakaiyin Samuel kama anasei bang chun David chu Israel chunga leng chang din thao anutauve.
David le Israel mite abonchan akon uvin, agamsunga cheng Jebus mi kitiho chenna, Jebus khopi Jerusalem chu adel khum tauve.
Hichun Jebus khopia anacheng hon David jah a, “Itijong leh nahung lut thei louhel ding ahi,” anatiuve. Ahivanginla David chun Zion kulpi chu alatai; hiche Zion hi David khopi kisah ahiye.

David chun anaphongin, “Koi koi hijengjong leh Jebus mi that masapen pen chu apipua kapansah a sepai lamkaiya kakoi ding ahi,” anati. Hichea hin Zeru’iah chapa Jo’ab chu akontou masan anapangin ahileh, apipun ahung pang tah bah tai.
Chujouvin David chu Zion kulpi sunga acheng denin ahileh, hichejeh chun akulpi chu David khopi tin akiminvo tai.
David’in jong akhopi chu Millo kiti laiya pat akimvel kikolpengin asan, adang amoh chengse vang chu Jo’ab chun asempha phan ahi.
Pakai thanei chungnung penin apanpi jeh-in David chu aloupi cheh aloupi cheh jengin ahi.

Israel chung chang thudola Pakai thusei dungjuiya Israel pumpito kitho khoma David leng chan jouna dinga alenggam sunga David panpia akithopi, David dinga mihat gal-hang apipua pang miho chu anoiya kisei miho hi ahiuve.

David dinga mihat gal-hang ho kisimna chu hiti hi ahi: Hach’mon mi Jasho’beam kitipa chu gal lamkai thum lah a apipua pang ahin, ama hin gal jathum jen chu atengchan akisut pin, khatvei than athat gam jengin ahi.
Mihat thum lah a ama ban a pa chu Ahoh insung mi Dodo chapa Elea’zar chu anahi;

amapa hi Pas-dam’mim kiti laiya Philistine te galbol dinga ahung kikhop pet ‘uvin David toh anapang khomin ahi. Hikom galmuna hin sakol chang dimset’in anakeh-in, Israel mite chu Philistine te masanga ajam gamtauve.

Ahivangin Elea’zar kitipa hi hiche loulai tah a chun ading det chet jengin, apanmun chon louhel’in apangin, galte adouvin, Philistine te chu asat lum lum jengin ahileh: chua konin Pakaiyin Israelte chu minthang tah-in gal ajosah jengin ahuhhing tai.

Lamkai pipu somthum lah a mi thum ho chu Reph’aim phaiya Philistine sepaiten ngahmun ahung sat jeng phat’ uvin, Adullam songko phunga chun David henga hiche songpi phunga chu kihou den din achesuh tauve.
Hichepet hin David chu kulpi sunga anaumin ahi; chule Philistine sepai honte chu Bethlehem khopia pansauva ahiye.
Hichun David’in jong twi aducha behseh jengin hitin aseitai, “Ohe, mi khattou bep’in Bethlehem khopi kelkot phung twikula kona twi khu don dinga eipeh thei hitave leh!” a tin asamtai.

Hichun hiche mihat thum ho hin Philistine mite ngahmun lailungpi chu atumkeh jenguvin, Bethlehem khopi kelkot phunga twikula twi chu agathal peh-uvin, David don din ahindop peh uvin ahi. Ahivanginla David chun atwi chu adonjo tapon, Pakai hou nan asung lhan ahitai.

Chule David chun aseiyin, “Pathen angsunga keiman hichepi kadon jeng ding chu haihel jeng hen. Keiman iti hiche miho thisan pi ‘chu kadon jeng ding ham’! Ijeh inem itileh amahon ahinkhou phal ngam hel a hiche twi hi aga dop’u ahibouve.” atin ahi. Hichejeh chun David’in twi chu adon tapoi. Hiche mihat mithum ho chun hitobang thil ho geiya hi anabol ngamu ahi.

Mihat somthum lah a lamkai pipua pang chu Jo’ab sopipa Abi’shai kitipa chu ahi. Ama hin galmi jathum akisat pin atengchan adouvin, abonchan asunlih soh hel’in mihat som thum lah a chun aminthang penin apang tan ahi.
Mihat somthum lah a ama chu aminthang pena apan phat’in abonchauva gal lamkaiyin apangtai; hijongleh mihat masa mithum ho chu aphajou deh hih laiye.

Jehoi’ada chapa Bena’iah kitipa, Kabzeel khoa hung kon gal-hang pa, thil nasa tah tah tampi boldoh pa jong hin Moab mite gal-hang ni jen asat lhun ahi. Chule buhbang lhah nikho khat jong hin akonsuh-in ahileh kokhuh sung khat’a hin sakei bahkai khat agathat’in ahi.

Chujongle Egypt mi milen tah, tong nga sang khat jong anathat’e. Hiche Egypt mipa hin akhut’a akichoiji tengcha atenglung jeng jong talhang tejen ahi; ahivangin Bena’iah kitipa hin tenggol khatseh akichoiyin ajonsuh jengin, Egypt mipa khut’a konin atengcha chu asalhah peh jengin, ama tengcha ma man amapa chu athat tai.
Jehoi’ada chapa Bena’iah kitipa chun hitobang bang thil ho hi anaboldoh jouvin, mihat somthum lah a chun aminthang pentah-in ahung pangtai.
Ama hi mihat lah a vang aminthang penin apang nan, ahivangin mihat thum ho chu aphajou jep hih laiye. David’in amapa hi ama tahsa vengtup lamkaiyin apansah tan ahi.
Sepaiho lah a mihat loi chu: Jo’ab sopipa Asahel toh, Bethlehem khoa mi Dodo chapa Elba’nan toh,
Harod khoa kona Shammoth ahin, Pelon mi Helez jong ahi.
Teko’a khoa mi Ikkesh chapa Ira jong ahin, Anathoth khoa mi Abi-e’zer jong ahi:
Hushath mi Sib’becai jong ahin, Ahoh khoa mi I’lai jong ahi;
Netoph’ah mi Ma’harai jong ahin, Netoph’ah mi Ba’anah chapa Heled jong ahi;
Benjamin chate gamsung Gib’eah khoa Ribai chapa Ithai jong ahin, Pir’athon khoa mi Bena’iah jong ahi;
Ga’ash luidunga Hurai jong ahin, Ar’bath khoa mi Abi’el jong ahi;
Baha’rum khoa mi Az’maveth jong ahin, Sha’al’bon khoa mi Eli’ahba jong ahi;
Gizon khoa mi Hashem ahin, Harar khoa mi Shagee chapa Jonathan jong ahi;
Harar khoa mi ma ma Sachar chapa Ahi’am ahin, Ur chapa Eli’phal jong ahi;
Mecherath khoa mi Hepher ahin, Pelon mi Ahi’jah ahi;
Carmel khoa mi Hezro ahin, Ezbai chapa Na’arai ahi;
Nathan sopipa Jo’el ahin, Hagri chapa Mibhar ahi;
Ammon mi Zelek ahin, Be’eroth khoa mi Na’harai ahi; ama hi Zeru’iah chapa Jo’ab galvonpoa pang anahi;
Ithir khoa mi Ira ahin, Ithir khoa mi ma ma Gareb ahi;
Hit mi Uri’ah ahin, Ahlai chapa Zabad jong ahi;
Reuben phunga mi Shiza chapa Ad’ina ahin, ama jong hi Reuben chate lah a lamkai khat ahin, sepai somthum apuiye;
Ma’acah chapa Hanan ahin, Mathan mi Josh’aphat ahi;
Ashterath khoa mi Uzzi’a ahin, Aro’er mi Shama le Je-i-el ahilhone;
Shimri chapa Jedi’a-el le asopipa Joha ahilhonin, Tiz khoa migel ahilhone:
Mahav mi Eli’el ahin, chule El’na-am chapa teni Jer’ibai le Joshavi’ah ahilhone; chule Moab mi Ithmah jong vang ahinai;
chutengleh Mezoba khoa mi Eli’el le Obed toh chule Ja-asi’el ahiuve.

Kish chapa Saul jeh a anop nop’a alen thei lou laiya Ziklag khoa atham laiya David henga hung kikhom miho chu amaho hi ahiuvin, amaho hin David chu akithopiuva gal asat piu ahin, mihat kiti ho lah a chu pang ahiuve.

Amaho hi thalpi kapthem jeng ahiuvin, akhut jet le vei pantoa song chang jeng jong aboma jangjela septo gel thei cheh ahiuve; abonchauva hi Saul chutoh inko jeng ahiuvin, Benjamin phunga mijeng ahiuve.

Apipu pen a pang chu Ahi-e’zer ahin, ama ban a Jo’ash ahin, amani hi Gib’eah khoa mi Shema’ah chapa ahilhone; chujongle Az’maveth chapa teni Je’zi-el le Pelet jong ahilhonin ahi; Ber’acah le An’athoth khoa mi Jehu jong ahin,

Gibeon khoa mi Ishma’iah jong ahi; mihat somthum lah a chu ahatpen khat ahin, hijeh chun mi somthum lah a chun alamkaiyin a pangin ahi; Gede’rah khoa mi Jeremiah ahin, Jahazi’el ahin, Joha’nan ahin, Jozabad ahiuve;
Eiu’zai ahin, Jer’imoth ahi; Beali’ah ahin, Shemari’ah ahi; Shephati’ah ahin, ama hi Har’uph mi ahiye;
Elka’nah ahin, lsshi’ah ahi; Az’arel ahin, Jo-e’zer ahi; chutengle Korah mi Jasho’be-am kitipa chutoh ahiuve;
chujongleh Gedor khoa mi Jero’ham chapa teni Jo-e’lah le Zebadi’ah jong ahilhone.

Gamthip noiya kulpi phunga jong chun Gad chaten David agapanhu uvin, amaho chu mihat gal-hang cheh, galbol themsa cheh le lum heije leh tengkho je them cheh, amaisou jong sakei bahkaiho maiso abang jengin, aman gan danu jong molvuma sakhi lagolte kichom jangkhai jet jet toh abang jenguvin ahi.
Ezer chu apipu pen ahin, ama ban a Obadi’ah ahin, Eli’ab chu athum lhinna ahi;
Mishman’nah kitipa chu li lhinna ahin, Jeremiah chu nga lhinna ahi;
gup lhinna chu Attai ahin, Eli’el chu sagi lhinna ahi;
Joha’nan chu get lhinna ahin, Elza,bad chu ko lhinna ahi;
Jeremiah chu som lhinna ahin, Mach’bannai chu som le khat lhinna ahitai.
Gad chate mi hijat chu sepai lamkai jeng ahiuvin; sepai lham mai mai chu alhom lam joh ja khat aval’uvin, atam lamjoh chu sang khat aval’uve.

Mi hijat hin lha masapen sunga Jordan aso laitah, vapang letdoh hel’a twi alet pet tah a apal galkaiyuva, phaicham dunga cheng mite abonchauva adeljam soh keiyuva, niso lam leh nilhum lama athecheh soh jengu ahitai.
Benjamin chate mi phabep le Judah chate mi phabep jong David kulpia chun ahunguvin ahi.

David jong amaho chutoh kimuto din apotdoh-in ajah uva agaseiye, “Gol le paiya uma keima kithopi dinga hung nahiuva ahileh kalungthim hi nang ho lungthim toh kigom jeng ding ahin; amavang nang hon kei hi lhep lhah a kakidoupite henga peh doh ding neigot’u ahivang leh, keiman kakhut te nia hi thilse kabol khah lou ahijeh-in, ipu ipateu Pathenin hinve hen lang nang ho nalethuh jengu hen,” ati.

@@Hichun mihat somthum lah a apipupa Ama’sai chunga Lhagao ahung pansan, hijeh chun aman jong aseitai, “Vo David, keiho nami kahiuvin, Vo Jesse chapa, nangto pang khom ding kahiuve; Cham lenghen, cham lenghen nachunga Napanhu ho chunga cham lenghen. Ijeh-inem itileh Na-Pathenin nangma napanpi jing nai,” atitai. Chuphat’in David’in amaho hi asangin. asepaite lah a lamkaiyin apansah soh tai.

Saul kisatpi dinga Philistine te toh kilhona David ahung galkon pet jong chun Manas’seh chate phabep’in David ajop kit tauve. Ahin Philistine te chu David’in apanpi tapoi; ijeh-inem itileh Philistine te vaipoa pang ho chu kihoutoh uva David chu anungsol mangu ahitai: ajeh chu hitia hi anaseiyu ahi, “Eiho suhgama manthahsah dia ama hin apupa Saul ahinda lhah a eiho henga ilu-u tan a hung pang goa ahibouve,” atiu ahi.

David chu Ziklag kho langa akile kit phat’in hiche Manas’seh chate hin David nung ajuiyuva agapanpiu ahitai; amaho chu Adnah ahin, Joz’abad ahin, Jedi’a-el ahin, Michael ahin, Joz’abad ma ma ahin, Eli-hu ahin, chule Zil’lethai toh ahiuvin, abonchauva hi Manas’seh sepaite lah a asang sang lamkai jeng ahiuve.
Amaho hin michomgamte dounan David anapanpiuve; Ijeh-inem itileh amaho hi mihat gal-hang jeng ahiuvin, sepai lah a athuneiya pang lamkai jeng ahiuve.
Hitobang hin nisim niseh-in David henga akithopi din mi ahung hungjenguvin, sepai hon tamtah akikhop doh-uva Pathen sepaite tobang hel’a akikhop doh kahseuvin akikhom khom jenguve.
Pakai thuseisa dungjuiya Saul lengvaipohna alenggam pumpi David chansah dinga Hebron khopia David henga hung kikhomdoh sepaite chu amijat mong mongu aloi loiya akihop dol’uvin hijat hi anahiuve.
Judah phunga hung kondoh mite chu lum le tengcha tho thei cheh a pho le tengcha thoa hung kon chu manchah choi cheh sang gup le ja get alhinguve.
Simeon phunga mi chu gal sat thei cheh mihat gal-hang jeng sang sagi le ja khat alhinguve.
Levi chate chu sang li le ja gup ahiuve.
Aaron insung mi ahung kondoh chu lamkai Jehoi’ada chun ahinpuiyin, sang thum le ja sagi alhinguve.
Mihat galhang tah gollhang khat Zadok kitipa chu apa insung konse se gal lamkai cheh mi som ni le ni toh ahung kilhonin ahi.
Saul inkote Benjamin miho lah jenga jong sepai sang thum ahung kondoh-uvin, hiche ho lah a atamjo vang chu Saul insung dinga langkai nalai ahiuve.
Ephraim phunga mite chu sang som ni le ja get ahiuvin, mihat gal-hang jeng, apu apau insung cheh a minthangsa cheh ahiuvin ahi.
Manas’seh phung akeh khat’a konin sepai sang get ahung kondoh uvin, amaho hi phongtah a hunguva David chu leng chansah ding agot jengu ahitai.

Is’sachar phunga konin jong phat kiheidol hethema, Israel in ipi abola phaham, ti photoh thei ho chu haosa jeng le upa jeng jeng mihem ja ni jen ahunguvin, amaho nungjui, athu noiyuva um mihem ainkote chengseu toh ahiuve.
Zebulun phunga konin jong aphat phat’a kipansah sepai gal manchah jatchom chom kipat’a galmuna pang jeng thei sang som nga jen lung khatseh pun David kithopi din ahunguvin ahi.
Naph’tali phunga konin jong sepai lamkai thunei cheh mi sang khat le lum le teng thoa sepai sang somthum le sang sagi jen ahunguve.
Dan phunga mite jong galmuna pang theiya manchah kichoi cheh mihem sang som ni le sang get toh, jagup ahunguvin ahi.
Asher phunga kon chun aphat phat’a kipansah sepai galmuna pang dia kigosa dem cheh mihem sang som li ahunguvin ahi.
Jordan vadung gal lama cheng Reuben chate ahin, Gad chate ahiuvin. chule Manas’seh phung akeh khat ahiuvin, gal manchah chom chom kipat’a hung kon sepai sang ja khat le sang som ni ahunguve.

Mihem hijat, galsat jeng dia gonsa mi hijat pi hi galmuna pangsa bang bangin akigol toh soh keiyuvin, Israel pumpi chunga David chu leng chansah din lung gel kitohsoh keiyin ahung kitol’uvin Hebron khopia ahung tauve; hitobang bang hin Israel mi amoh chengse jong chu David leng chansahna dingin lung khatseh pun akitohsoh keitauvin ahi.
Hebron khopia asopi au anaoteu chun gontohsan anakoiyun, nithum sungin amaho hi David koma anichongun, an aneuvin lengpitwi adon’uvin ahi.

Chujongle akinaipiu akhoheng jouse jong chun Is’sachar lang peh le Zebulun kho lang peh gei, chule Naph’tali kho langpeh geiyin sangan tamtah le sangongsao tamtah sakolpol ho geiyin amanguvin, bongchal ho geisanin amanguvin anneh ding twi don thalhing tah-in, neng jeng jungin changlhah hihen, theichangga changlhah a kisem hi hen, lengpitheiboh hijongleh, lengpitwi hihen lang thaotwi jeng hijongleh, kitha ding bongchal ho le kelngoi ho geiyin jong, ni thum sunga Israelte lah a kipapia golnop bolpina dingin ahintol tol jenguvin ahi.
David chun sepai asang sang lamkaiho leh aja ja lamkai ho ahiuvin, lamkai jouse chu akihoupin, achang chehin akihoupin ahi.

Chujongle David chun Israel Houbung pumpi jah a chun aseitai, “Nang hon hiche hi pha nasah uva, chule hiche hi Pakai i-Pathenu lungdei ahidinga ahileh tun eihon sottolle miho sol jengu hitin, Israel gamsung pumpia um nalai miho leh thempuho chule Levi miho ama ama khopi cheh leh achenna hamhing gamsung cheh a konin gakoudoh sah-uhitin, eiho henga hungu hen lang eihung kipapiu hen.
Chutengle i-Pathenu thingkong chu eiho henga gapu lut kit taute; ajeh chu Saul nikho laiya pat’a hiche khu don louva ikoipeh-u ahitai,” ati.
Athilsei chu mipi abonchauva amitmu’uvin adih lheh jengin ahileh, chutia bol ding chu Houbung pumpi anomtauve.
David chun Kir’iath-je’arim khoa pat’a Pathen thingkong polut dingin Israel mite pum piuvin Egypt gam Shihor khoa pat Hamath lang jotna kotphung geiyin akhomsoh keiyin ahi.

Chuin David le Israel pumpi chu Ba’alah kiti Kir’iathje’arim kho langa chun akitol tou tauve, hiche Kir’iath-je’arim kho hi Judah gamsung ahin, hiche kho muna kona hi cherub teni chunga laltouna kitousah Pakai min kiputsah Pathen thingkong chu gaputdoh ding agot’u ahi.

Hiti hin mihon Pathen thingkong chu Abin’adab le Uzzah chule Ahi’o kitipa insunga konin bongkang thah leh khat hin ahintoldoh uvin, bongchal chu Abin’adab le Uzzah toh chule Ahi’o kitipa chu atolsah uvin ahi.
Chutah chun David le Israel pumpi Pathen angsunga nom asauvin, athahat pumpiuvin la asauvin, selangdah le samjang asaiyun, khong le dah chu le khutbeh abenguvin, saki pengkul amut’uvin ahi.
Chidon kitipa changphol ahung gei phat’uvin bongchal akipal lhun ahileh Uzza kitipa chun Pathen thingkong chu tuh agon akhut agah lam jengin ahi.
Hijeh chun Uzza chunga Pakai ahung lung hang jah jengin, Pathen thingkong tuhna khut alhandoh jeng jeh chun adengin ahileh, Uzza jong hikoma chun Pathen angsunga athiden tai.
Hitobanga Pakaiyin Uzza asuh gep jeng jeh chun David alung himo behseh jengin, hijeh chun tuni geiyin hiche lai mun hi Perez-uzza tin akiminvo lo tan ahi.
Hiche nikhoa patchun David’in Pathen aginlo tan, “Pathen thingkong chu iti insunga kahinpoh lut thei ding hiya kakoma kapoh lut ding hi tam?” tin aseitai.
Hijeh chun David’in Pathen thingkong chu David khopi sunga apolut tapon, Git mi Obed-e’dom kitipa inlam joh a aletol lut tan ahi.

Obed-e’dom te insunga chun Pathen thingkong chu ainsung mite chutoh lha thum sungin acheng khom’ uvin ahi; hiche sung hin Pakaiyin Obed-e’dom insung mite leh anei athil alo abonchan phatthei aboh boh jengin ahi.
Tyre gam lengpa Hiram chun David henga sottolle miho asol’in, cedar thingjong tam pi athot’in, thing vaipo ho leh thing thembol ho jong David ding in khat sahpeh din asolpeh-in ahi.
David jong chun akigela ahileh Pakaiyin ama chu Israel chunga lenga atundoh mong mong ahitai ti ahedoh tan ahi, chujongle ama lenggam chu amite khohsah jal’in akichoi sang lheh jeng tai.
Jerusalem khopia chun David chun ji aneibe be kit’in chule cha numei le pasal jong ahinbe be kit’in ahi.
Jerusalem khopia David’in ahinkit achate chu aminu hicheng hi ahi: Shammu’a, Shobab, Nathan, Solomon,
Ibhar, Eli’shu’a, El’pelet,
Nogah, Nepheg, Japhi’a,
Elish’ama, Beeli’ada chule Eliph’elet hicheng hi ahiuve.

Israel pumpi chunga leng chang din David chu min thao anutauve, ti thu thang ajahdoh phat’uvin. Philistine mite abonchan akontouvun David hol din achetauve: hiche thu David’in ajahdoh kit phat’in Philistine te kisatpi din amajong akondoh pai jengin ahi.
Hiti chun Philistine miho chu ahung kon’uvin Reph’aim phaiya cheng ho ahinchom tauve.

Chuphat’in David’in jong Pakai adongin. “Keima Philistine te toh kisat dingin kon leng nangman amaho khu kei khut’a neipehdoh ding hinam?, atia ahileh: Pakaiyin David jah a aseipeh-in. “Kontou jengin. keiman abonchauvin nangma khut a pedoh nange,” atitai.

Hijeh chun David jong Ba’al-pera’zim kiti lai geiyin akontou pai jengin ahileh, hikoma chun Philistine te agajouvin, hijeh chun David jong chun aseitai “Pathenin kamelmate chu keima khut hin asugoi jengin asugep tai, twisoh hung lengjah abahsah jenge.” ati. Hichejeh chun hikom lai hi amin Ba’al-pera’zim tin akiminvo lotan ahi.
Philistine miten apathen lim semthu u doi ho chu adalhauvin, David jong chun mi asol’in abonchan ahalvam sah tai.
Ahivangin Philistine te chu ahung kon kit leuvun phaicham dung ahung chom kit’uvin ahi.

Hijeh chun David’in jong Pathen adong kit’in ahileh. Pathenin ajah a aseipeh-in. “Nangin amaho nung khu juitou dan, achung lam’uva khun hinveljon lang balsam thing phung a khun amasang lam ‘uva konin hinle non.

Nangman balsam thing phung chung dunga mi hung kitolgin najah tengleh galsat din kipatdoh jengin potdoh tan: ijeh-inem itileh Philistine mite sepai ho sugam dinga namasanga Pathen galkondohsa ahitai.” ati.
Pathenin athupeh bang bangin David’in aboltai. hijeh chun Israelten Philistine sepaite chu Gibeon khoa pat’ in Gezer kho geiyin asat chap peh jenguvin ahi.
Chutah chun gamtina David min akithangjal jengin, chule Pakaiyin jong namtin vaipi chunga David ginna achuhsah tan ahi.
David khopi Jerusalema chun David’in ama ding mong mongin in tampi akisah tai; chuin David chun Pathen thingkong koina ding mun khat asemin, hikoma chun thingkong tunna din ponbuh khat asonge.

Hichun David’ in aseiyin. “Levi miho tailou midang koimachan Pathen thingkong chu aput thei louhel ding ahi, ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin Levi miho hi Pathen thingkong pu le dia alhendoh a. ama kinbola pang dinga akoisa ahiuve.” ati.
Hichun David jong chun Jerusalem khopia Israelte abon∑chan akhomsoh keiyin, akoina dinga asemna muna koi din Pathen thingkong chu gaput tou din agon ahi.
Hichea hin David’in Aaron chapate leh Levi chapate jouse jong akhomin.
Kohath chapate lah a alamkai pipu Uri’el ahin. asopite mihem ja khat le som ni toh ahung kilhon ‘uvin a hi:
Merar’i chapate lah a konin jong alamkai pi pun Asa’iah kitipa chu ahung pangin asopite mihem ja nile som ni ahinpuiye:
Gershom chapate lah a alamkai pi pun Jo’el ahung pang in asopite mihem ja khat le som thum ahinpuiyin ahi:
Eliza’phan chapate lah a Shemai’ah lamkai pipun apongin, asopite mihem ja ni ahinpuiye.
Hebron chapate lah a jong Eli’el chu alamkai pipun ahung pangin asopite mihem som get ahinpuiyin ahi:
chutengleh Uz’ziel chapate lah a Ammin’adab chu alamkai pipu penin ahung pangin asopite mihem jakhat le som khat le ni ahunguvin ahiye.
Hichun David in jong thempuho Zadok le Abi’athar toh, Levi miho lah a Uri’el ahin. Asa’iah ahin, Jo’el ahin, Shemai’ah ahin, Eli’el ahin chule Ammin’adab ahin akoukhom soh keiyin,

chule ajah uva aseitai, “Nang ho hi Levi phung sunga mite lah a apu apau khangguiya upa cheh nahiuvin, nang ho le nang ho, nang ho jeng jong nasopiteu jong kisutheng uvin: Pakai Israel Pathen thingkong koina dinga kagonna muna hi nakoi thei na diuvin. naputdohna diu ngaitouvin.
Ijeh-inem itileh amasa a chu eihon thingkong chu ipoh lut thei louvu anahi, ajeh chu akimanchah ding dol kisei banga bolna ding ikhohsah loujeh-u ahi, ati.
Hijeh chun thempuho leh Levi miho chu Pakai Israel Pathen thingkong put-dohna ding ngaito nan amaho le amaho akisuthenguvin ahi.
Hichun Pakaiyin aseipeh a Mose’n thu apeh bangin Levi mihon Pathen thingkong chu moljol nin akengkouva apu’uvin ahi.
David chun kipa ogin thongje jua sama, thumje jua tumging thei manchah manga, selangdah le semjang saiya, khutbeh beng ginga lasa din Levi miho upa lamkaiho jah a asopteu apansah diuvin aseipeh tai.
Hijeh chun Levi ho jong chun Jo’el chapa Heman le Berechi’ah chapa Asaph toh, Merari chapate leh asopiteu, Kusha’iah chapa Ethan toh apansah uvin ahi;

chutengle amaho ban a pang din asopiteu loi khat ma, Zechari’ah ahin, Ja-a’ziel ahin, Shemir’amoth ahin, Jehi’el ahin, Unni ahin, Eli’ab ahin, Bena1’ah ahin, Ma’ase’iah ahin, Mattithi’ah ahin, Eliph’elehu ahin, chule Mikne’iah le kelkot ngah a pang teni O’bed-e’dom le Je-i’el jong ahiuvin ahi.
Lathem mi Heman le Asaph toh, chule Ethan amaho hin sum-eng khutbeh ho chu abeh ging diu ahiye.
Chutengle Zechari’ah, A ‘zi-el, Shemir’amoth, Jehi’ el, Unni, Eli’ab, Ma’ase’iah, chule Bena’iah loi hin okai li lhingset’a lasahna dinga selangdah asai diu ahi.
Mattithi’ah le Eliph’elehu toh, Mikne’iah toh, O’bed-edom toh, Je-i’el le Azaziah vang hin okai get lhingset’a sah dinga semjang asai ging diu ahiye.
Chutengleh Levi ho lah a la lamkaipa Chenani’ah kitipa hin lakaije ahetjeh a tumging thei bolje jong ahet ahin, amahin asaije jong ahil ding ahi.
Chutengleh Berechi’ah le Elka’nah vang chu Pathen thingkong kikoina kotngah a pang lhon ding ahi.

Chule Shebani’ah le Josh’aphat toh, Nethan’el le Ama’sai toh, Zeehari’ah le Benai’ah toh, chule Elie’zer pum puma thempu hijat hin Pathen thingkong maiya chu saki pengkul amut chch diu ahi. O’bed-e’dom le Jehi’ah jong chu Pathen thingkong kikoina kotngah ma ma a pang ding ahilhone.
Hiti hin David le Israel upate, sepai asang sang lamkai jouse chu kipah tah a O’bed-e’dom ina kona Pakai kitepna thingkong pudoh dingin achetauve.
Pakaiyin Pakai kitepna thingkong pua pang Levi miho chu apanhu jeh-in amahon jong bongchal sagi le kelngoichal sagi jen kilhai nan athat’uvin ahi.

David chun tupat ponnem ponchol akisil’in, thingkong pua pang Levi ho jong chun akisil’uvin, lathem ho le Chenani’ah kitipa lathem ho la lamkaipan jong akisil’in; David vang hin tupat’a kikhong thempu von khat akivonin ahi.

Hiti hin Israel pumpin Pakai kitepna thingkong chu agapu touvun, saki amut’uvin pengkul amut ginguvin, chule khutbeh abenguvin, tumging thei jouse atum’un, selangdah asaiyun, semjang jong asaiyun, thumje jun ahinpu toutauve.

Pakai kitepna thingkong chu David khopia ahinput lut phat’uvin, Saul chanu Michal chun bangkot’a konin aven ahileh David lengpa chu alama kipah thanom tah a achop jeng chu amudoh tai; hijeh chun amanun jong David chu alungthim sungin ajapi behseh jengin ahi.

Mihon Pathen thingkong chu ahinpu lut’uvin hiche thingkong tunna ding David’in agonsa ponbuh sunga atung tauve; chujongle miho chun Pathen angsunga pumgo thilto le chamna thilto kilhaina gantha abol’uvin ahi.
David chun pumgo thilto to ding le chamna thilto to ding dol atosoh phat’in mipi chu Pakai minin phatthei aboh tai;
chule Israel pumpi chu abonchavin numei pasal amitel chanin changlhah lhon khat le sa chan khat toh, chule lengpiga changlhah phenga kisem khat cheh apen ahi.
David chun hiche abol kalval jong chun Levi miho lah a phabep jong Pakai thingkong maiya chu Pakai Israel Pathen minphah a thangvah ding le vahchoi din apansah tah ahi.

Hiche ho lah ahin Asaph chu alamkai pipu penin apangin ama ban a pang chu Zechari’ah ahin, Je-i’el ahin, Shemir’amoth ahin, Jehi’el ahin, Mattithi’ah ahin, Eli’ab ahin, Benai’ah ahin, Obed-e’dom ahin, chule Je-i’el jong ahiuvin, amaho hin selangdah asaiyuva, semjang asai diu, Asaph chun khutbeh abeh ging ding ahi.
Chutengleh thempute ni Benai’ah le Jahazi’el chu Pakai kitepna thingkong maiya tang louhel’a pengkut mut’a pang ding ahilhone.
Hiche nikho chun amasapenin David chun Asaph le asopiten asah diuvin thangvahna Pakai henga sah ding la abol’in ahi.
Pakai chu thangvah jingun lang, Ama minin tao jing jenguvin; Mitin vaipi hijat lah a hin, Pakai natoh hijatpi hi phongdoh uvin hetsah-un.
Pakaiya la sauvin, avahchoi la sauvin, Anatoh athilbol kidang jouse phong leuvin.
Pakai mintheng choi-an uvin lang, Ama hola ngaichate lungthim kipa thanop sah-un.
Ama thahat’in kisongin Pakai chu hol uvin, Tantih neitouvin ama angsung del jingun.
Pakai thil kidang bol jouse geldoh jingun lang, Ama tohsa athutanna jouse getdoh jinguvin.
Vo alhachapa Abraham son achithah mite, Alhentum mite Jacob chapate ho!
Ama chu Pakai kitipa eiho Pathen chu ahin, Leiset chunga hin ama thutanna adimset jenge.
Aman aitih chanin jong akitepna agel jingin,
Hiche kitepna chu aman Abraham toh anasemsa ahin, Isaac henga kitepna thutep anapehsa ahi.
Hiche thu hi Jacob henga asuh det paiya, Israelte dia tonsot kitepna chondana akoi ahi;
Hitia aseiya, “Nangma chan ding nagoulo gam dinga, Keiman Canaan gam hi kapeh ding nahi,” anati.
Agamsunga hi mihem lhomcha ahiuva, Isah khamlou khopem mai mai ahi laiyun,
Nam khat’a konin nam khat henga avah leuvin, Lenggam khat’a konin midangte henga avah leuve;
Ahinla Pakaiyin amaho chu mi abolgenthei sah pon, Amaho jeh-in leng le lalte aphoh phoh jie;
Hitin aseiyin, “Kathaonusa mite tongkha hih uvin. Kathemgao ho jong suse hih uvin!” ati.
Leiset pumpin Pakai vahchoi la sauvin lang Amihuhhingna niseh leh seichoi leuvin.
Namtin vaipi lah a aloupi phong jal’uvin lang, Mitin vaipi lah a athilbol kidang phong leuvin!
Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai chu loupi tah ahin, Loupi tah a vahchoi ding lom ahi; Ama hi pathen dang jouse sanga Gin le ja a bol ding choi sang ding ahi.
Ajeh chu mitin vaipin ahouvu pathen ati hou hi Milimdoi kisemthu jeng ahin, Pakai kitipa vang hi Van jouse jong sempa Ama ahiye.
Pakai angsunga jabolna le lal loupina achengin, Ama umna thahat le kipana aum jing jenge.
Mitin vaipi lah a phung tina miten Pakai chu choi-an uvin; Loupina le thahatna chu Pakaiya peuvin lang hiuvin.
Pakai amina achan lomtah loupina peuvin lang, Thilto choiyin ama angsunga hunguvin! Von thengsel’in kivon’uvin lang Pakai chu chibai boh cheh-uvin.
Pakai angsunga leiset pumpi kihot hot’un lang, Tolmang kit louhel din leiset pangchah hen.
Vanmun jouse kipah hen lang, Leiset jeng jong kipah thanom hen; Van le leiset hin namtin vaipi lah a seiyuhen,
Twikhanglen le asunga cheng jouse kithongu hen, Tolpi le asunga chengte kichoi sangu hen.
Chutengle gamlah a thingphung jousen kipa la asah diu, Leiset thutana ahung teng Pakai anga kipah diu ahi.
Aphatna jal’in Pakai chu thangvah uvin, Ajeh chu alungset longlou chun tonsot geiyin athoh-e.

Hitin seiyun lang, “Neihuhdoh uvin Vo eihuhhinguva Pathen, Namtin vaipi lah a neichom khom’uvin neihuhhing un; Chutileh keihon namintheng thangvah ung ting, Nangma kavahchoiyuva Loupi tah a kabol diu nahi.
Atonsot atonsot geiyin Pakai Israel Pathen nun nom jing hen.” tiuvin,” tia aseiyuva ahileh mipin abonchauyin, “Amen,” atiuvin Pakai avahchoi cheh uve.
David chun Asaph le asopite chu Pakai kitepna thingkong maiya adalhan, ani nia akhoh dungjuiya thingkong maiya kinbola pang din angansen ahi.
Chujongle O’bed-e’dom le asopite mi somgup jen jong chu angansen, Jedu’thun chapa O’bed-e’dom le Hosah vang chu kelkot dung ngah-in apang lhone.
Chule David chun thempupa Zadok le asopite thempuho chengse chu Gibeon khopia muntheng kisem laiya Pakai houbuh maiya pang din adalhai.
Amaho hin Pakai dinga pumgo thilto kitonaji maicham phunga chu jingkah nilhah a pumgo thilto ato to jenguva, Pakaiyin Israel athupeh danthu lekhabua kijih bang banga abol jing jeng diu ahi.

Amaho lah a hin apang khom din Heman le Jeduthun jong akilhengin, chule Pakai thangvahna bol dinga amin cheh a phong tah a kiminphah chan chu pang din aumuvin ahi, ajeh chu Pakai lungset longlou hin tonsot geiya athoh jingjeh a thangvah le vahchoi lom mong mong ahi.

Heman le Jedu’thun hin sumkon tampi le khutbeh tampi anei lhonin, tumging theiya manchah ding leh latheng sahna dinga manchah ding anei lhonin ahi. Kelkot phunga pang din Jedu’thun chapate jong akipansah-in ahiye.
