Chujouvin mipi abonchauvin ama ama inlam cheh a acheuvin, David jeng jong chu ama insung mite phatthei boh dingin ainlama achetan ahi.

David chu aina achen phat’in Nathan themgaopa jah a chun David chun aseiyin, “Vetan, keima hi cedar thing jenga kisa insunga kachengin, Pakai kitepna thingkong khu la ponbuh sung khat mai maiya akikoiye,” ati.
Chuphat’in Nathan jong chun David jah a aseiyin, “Nalunga nagel jouse chu bol jengin, ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin napanpi jing nai,” ati.
Ahivanginla hiche jan chun Pakaiyin Nathan henga thu ahinseiyin,
“Chen lang kalhachapa David gaseipeh tan. ‘Pakaiyin hitin aseiye: “Nangin keima chenna ding in nei sahpeh louhel ding ahi.

Ajeh chu Israelte kahin puidoh nikhoa pat chun tuni gei hin keima insunga kacheng kha hih laiye: ponbuh khat’ a konin ponbuh chom khatma kakichon le le jengin, chenna mun khat’a konin chenna mun chom dang khatma kakichonle len ahibouve.

Hitobanga Israelte toh kakichonle na mun tina hin keiman kamite kelngoi chin banga ching dia kalhendoh kathupeh miho henga chun thu kanaseiyin hitin kati, ‘Ipi dinga nang hon keima chenna ding cedar thinga kisa in khat beh neisah peh louvu ham?’ tin kaseiye,” anati.

Hijeh chun nangman tua hi kalhachapa David henga hitia hi naseipeh ding ahi, “Pakai thanei chung nungpen pan hitin aseiye, ‘Keiman nang hi hamhing lah a kelngoi chinga napanna muna kona kapuidoh a, kamite Israelte chunga leng chansah ding kati nahin;

hijeh a chu hoikom muna chele jong le chun kalhonpi jing jenga, namasanga namelmate jouse jong abonchauva kasuhgam peh jing jeng ahi: hitobanga chu leiset chunga mi minthang thang ho banga nang jong min thansah ding kagot nahiye.

Chutengle keiman kamite Israel dinga chen mun khat kalhendoh peh ding, amaho chu achenna ding mun’uva det tah a achenden theina diuva amaho chu kachensah ding ahiuvin, chuteng vangleh koiman lung ling laova alhalou diu mi sugenthei ten jong amaho chu asuh mang kit lou diu,

keiman aphat phat dungjuiya kamite Isreal chunga thutan vaihom miho kapansah jing jeng ding ahi. Chujongle keiman namelmate abonchauva kasuh lhah a, nanoiya kakunsah ding ahi. Hicheng kalvala jong chu ken nahenga kaphondoh ahi, Pakaiyin nangma dinga in khat nasahpeh ding ahiye.

Nahinkho abulhina napu napate henga leng dia nache teng jongleh keiman nangma nunga nason nachilhah mi khat pen pen, nangma chapate lah a mi khat mong mong katundoh kit jenga ama lenggam chu kaphudet peh ding ahi.
Hiche nachapa chun keima dinga in khat eisahpeh ding ahi, chule keiman ama lenggam laltouna chu aitih chan geiya dia kaphudet peh ding ahitai.

Hiche nachapa dinga chu kei hi apa kahi ding, ama chu keima chapa hiding ahi: nang masanga mipa kalungset longlou kalah mangpeh banga ama chunga hi kalungset longlou chu kalah mang peh louhel ding ahi;
ama chu keima insunga kachendet sah a, keima lenggam sunga kachensah ding, alaltouna chu atonsot geiya long louva umden ahitai,’ tin aseiye,’ ati.
Hiche Pakai thusei chengse dungjui leh hitobang mu hijat anei dungjui hin Nathan themgaopan David henga aseitan ahi.

Chutah chun David lengpa jong alut paiyin Pakai angsunga atouvin aseitai, “Vo Pakai Pathen, keima hi ikhampi kahiya, chule ka insung hi ipi beh a nagel hita a, nangin hichan geiya jong hi neihin puipeh peh jing jeng hitam?

Ahinla hichepi jong hi, Vo Pathen, nangma mit vet’in thil neochan bou nagel nalaiye: vo Pakai Pathen, nangman phat phabep jouva hung lhung ding nalhachapa keima insung chung chang thudol jong naseitan, khang nunung lama thusoh ding jong neimusah tai.
Hitobanga nalhachapa najabolna hi lethuhna dinga David kitipa hin ipi kasei jou ding um am? Ajeh chu nangman nalhachapa keima hi neihetsa ahitai.
Vo Pakai, nalhachapa keima khohsahna le nangin jong nalungthim mong monga nagel bang chun, nangman hitobang minthanna hi nahin boldoh jengin, thil hijatpi hi neihetsah soh jengin ahitai.
Vo Pakai, nangma tobang koima aumpon, nangma tailou pathen dang jong aumpoi; hiche hi keihon kanabeng te niuva kajah mong mongu ahitan ahi.

Leiset chunga hi namite Israelte tobang nam dang koipen tah um kham? Pathen amatah a kona amaho hi amite hi dinga akilhatdoh a, hitobanga hi nangma ding tumtah a minthanna tah a nasemdoh a, thil loupi tijat umtah tah naboldoh jenga, namite masanga namtin vaipi nadel jamjam jenga, amaho chu Egypt gama kona jong nahin lhatdohsa hilou ham?
Chujongle nangman namite Israelte hi aitih chan geiya jong nangma mite hijing jeng dinga nasemsa ahitan, hijeh a chu vo Pakai nang jong amaho dinga a-Pathenu nahi ahitai.
Hijeh chun tunjong vo Pakai, nangman nalhachapa chung chang thudol le ama insung chung chang thudola naseidoh hiche thu nasei hi atonsot geiya din sudet tan, chujongle nasei bang bangin bol jengin.

Chutileh nangma min hi atonsot geiyajong kiphutdet a chule kichoi-an ding hitia kisei ding, ‘Thanei chung nungpen Pakai, Israelte Pathen hi Israel Pathen ahimong monge,’ tia kisei ding ahin; chule nalhachapa David insung jeng jong hi nangma angsunga kiphutdet ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh vo ka-Pathen, nangman nalhachapa kei hi insung khat katundoh peh ding ahi, tin neimusah tai; hijeh a chu nalhachapa kei jong nangma angsunga hang tah a hung tao ngama kahi.
Vo Pakai nangma bou Pathen nahin, nangman hitobang thilpha hijatpi hi nalhachapa keima din tun jong thutep naneitai;

chuti ahileh tua jong hi nalhachapa keima insung phatthei boh ding jong lung lhaiyin natin, nalhachapa insung jong chu aitih geiya mangthah louhel ding ahi; ajeh chu vo Pakai, nangin phatthei naboh chu ipi hijongle phatthei boh chang jeng ahiye,” ati.
Hiche nung jong hin David’in Philistine te akisatpin ahileh ajouvin, asu-lhan, Philistine mite khut’a konin Gath khopi le akhocha dung jouse abonchan alasoh tai.
David chun Moab mite jong akisatpin ajou kit’in, hijeh chun Moab mite chu David soh-in apanguvin, kai jong apetauve.
Euphrates luipi lama athahat jekhong dinga akontouna lampia David’in Hamath lang jotna Zobah lengpa Hadade’zer kitipa chu akisatpin ahileh ajoutai.

Hiche pa khut’a kon hin David chun kangtalai sang khat jen alahpeh-in, sakol touthem sepai sang sagi amanin, keng sepai jeng jong sang som ni aman-e; David’in kangtalai kaiya pang sakol jouse chu akeng atanpeh soh keiyin, kangtalai ja khat kai khambep bou akikhenin ahi.
Zobah lengpa Hadade’zer kithopi dinga Syria mite ahung kon’uvin jong David chun Syria mite sepai sang som ni le sang ni jen anathat gamin ahi.

Chujouvin David’in Syria gamsunga Damascus khopia chun sepai atousah-in, hiti hin Syria mite jong David noiya soh din ahunglut tauve; chujongle kai jong apeuvin ahi. Hiti hin David chu agal konna lam lama Pakaiyin gal ajosah sah jenge.
David chun Hadade’zer sepaite kipoh sana a kisemlum jouse chu akilah-in, abonchan Jerusalem khopia ahinpo lut soh keiye.

Hadade’zer khopi teni Tibhath kiti leh Cun kitia konin jong David chun sum-eng jeng tamtah akilah-e; hiche ho hi amanchah a Solomon chun kisilna sum-eng twikong le sum-eng khomho, chule sum-eng bel ho anasemdoh ahi.
David chun Zobah lengpa Hadade’zer kitipa sepaite abonchauvin ajoutai, tia thu kithang chu Hamath lengpa To’u kitipan ajadoh tai;

hijeh chun aman jong David lamtoa salam boldin achapa Hador’am kitipa chu asol’in, David’in Hadade’zer akisatpia ajojeh a ama pachat na thusei ding le salam bol din asole; ijeh-inem itileh Hadade’zer kitipa hin To’u lengpa chu akisatpi jing jeng anahi. To’u hin sana kiti tapou ijakaiyin athot-in, dangka ahin sum-eng ahin athot-e.

Hicheng thil ahinthot ho jong hi David chun aman namtin vaipia kona achomdoh ho chutoh dangka le sana ahin, Edom mitea kon, Moab mitea kon, Ammon mitea kon, Philistine mitea kon leh Am’alek mitea kona alahdoh chengse chutoh agomsoh keiyin Pakaiya dingin athenson ahitai.
Zeru’iah chapa Abi’shai kitipa chun Edom mi sang som le sang get jen chikhuh phaiya anathat’in ahi.
Chuin Edom gama jong sepai atousah tai: hijeh chun Edom gamsung mite jong David noiya soh-in ahung lut tauve. Hitobang hin David chu achena lam lam-ah Pakaiyin gal ajosah sah jengin ahi.
Hitobang tah hin David chu Israel pumpi chunga lengvaipon anapangin, amite mipi lah a chun thu adih dih jengin atanjin, mipi kibang cheh-in abol cheh-e.
David sepaite chunga vaipoa pang chu Zeru’iah chapa Jo’ab ahin, Ahi’lud chapa Jehosh’aphat kitipa chu thu ching lekha sunin anapange;
chujongle Ahi’tub chapa Zadok le Abi’athar chapa Ahim’elech kitipa chu thempun a pang lhone; chule Shavsha kitipa jong chu lekha sunin apangin ahi;
chutengleh Jehoi’ada chapa Bena’iah kitipa chu Cher’eth mite leh Pel’eth mite chunga chun vaipon anapange; chule David chapate chu lengpa kinbolna vaihom pipun apang soh keiyuvin ahi.
Hicheng thusoh jou hin Ammon mite lengpa Nahash kitipa chu athin, achapa chu ama khel’in lengvaipon apang tai.

Hichea hin David chun aseiyin, “Keiman Nahash chapa Hanun hi kitahna neitah a kabol ding ahi, ajeh chu apan jong keima kitahna neitah a einabol ahiye,” ati. Hijeh cham David’in jong Hanun lunghem lhem lung mong din sottolle miho asol’in apa athijala lhembi din asol tai. Hijeh chun David sohte sottolle ho chu Ammon mite gamsunga Hanun henga ama lhem lung mong din ahung tauve.

Ahinla Ammon mite lah a milen milalte chun Hanun jah a aseiyuvin, “David’in hitobanga nahenga nalhem lung mong ding mi hijat ahinsol jeh a hi nangman David hin napa ajabol monga nagel tah bah ham? Asohte hi nahenga hunguva gamsung kholtoh le ding leh aphotoh a hunga chujou tengleh agamsung mite hi abungbua tunjeng ding agot ahilam hi nahet lou ham?” tin aseitauve.

Hijeh chun Hanun lengpa hin David sohte chu amanin asamu avochaipeh jengin, aponsilu jong akimlai chenga achetanpeh hel jengin, akongjang atobuh dunguva achetanpeh-in chuin abonchauvin ainlama anung sol mangin ahi.

David sohte jong chu akipatdoh uvin apotdoh tauve. Sottolle miho chu ajachat behseh jeng phat’uvin David’in amaho lamto din mi asol’in ahileh miho chun David henga ahung seipeh tauve. Hichun David lengpan jong agah hil’in, “Nabengmul’u akikhan lhit kahsen Jericho khopia hung tham den tauvin, chujou tengleh hung kile kit tauvin nate,” atipeh-e.

Ammon mite hin athilbolu chu David hot lam ahikhan, amaho le amaho chu David deimon akisemdoh tauve, ti amudoh phat’uvin Hanun le Ammon mite chun Mesopota’mia gama kon le Aramma’acah gama kon chule Zobah gama kona sakol touthem sepaite leh kangtalai tampi thalahna din dangka talent sang khat jen athot tauve.

Hiche hin Ammon miten kangtalai sang somthum le sang ni toh, Ma’acah lengpa leh asepaite abonchan athalah jenguvin, hijeh chun Ma’acah lengpa jong chu ahung konin Med’eba maiya chun ngahmun akisemtan ahi. Chuin Ammon mite jong chu amaho le amaho akimsoh soh keiyuvin akhopi jouseu va konin ahung kikhomsoh keiyun galmuna pang din ahung tauve.
Hiche thu hi David chun ajah doh phat’in Jo’ab le sepaite lah a mihat gal-hang miho chu abonchan asoltai.
Ammon mite jong chu ahung kondoh jenguvin khopi kelkot phunga chun galsat din akigol tauve; chujongle galkon a hung leng dang dang ho jong chu acham chamin gamlah a chun akigol’uvin ahi.

Galmite chun amailam anung lama konin ahin um kimvel tauve, ti Jo’ab hin amudoh phat’in, aman jong Israel mite lah a lhentum mithem cheh phabep alhengdoh-in amaho chu Syria mite toh kisat din agol’in;
sepai amoh chengse chu asopipa Abi’shai lamkai nan asepai jouse chu galsat din agol kit’in, amaho chu Ammon mite toh kitoh din akigol tauve.

Hichun Jo’ab chun aseiyin, “Ijemtia Syria mite khu kei dinga adou hah behseh jenga kajo lou ding leh nangman neihu ding, chule Ammon mite jong khu nang dinga adou hah a nang sanga ahatjoh diuva ahileh keiman nahu nange.
Hang tah-in hung pangin lang, imite dinga pasal chaloh mong mong itho ding ahi, chutia chu i-Pathenu khopi jouse jong ihuh diu ahi; Pakaiyin aman aphatsah chu adei bangin bol jeng hen,” ati.
Hijeh chun Jo’ab le apanpi sepaite chu Syria mite masanga akitol lut’uvin galsat din akigotauve; ahin Syria mite chu Jo’ab masanga ajam gamsih seh tauvin ahi.

Syria mite jam gamsih seh chu Ammon mite jong chun amudoh phat’uvin amaho jong Abi’shai Jo’ab sopipa masanga konin ajam gamsih seh tauvin ahi. Amaho chu abonchauvin khopi sunga alhailut soh hel’uvin ahi. Hichun Jo’ab jong Jerusalem a ahung kilekit tai.

Syria mite chun Israelte alel hel’u akimudoh phat’uvin sottolle miho asol’ uvin Euphrates luipi dung gal a cheng Syria sepaite agakouvun, Hadade’zer lengpa sepai lamkaipa Shophach lamkai nan ahung puidoh tauve.

Ahinla athu hi David henga akithan lut phat’in, David jong chun Israel sepaite abonchan akhomin, Jordan vadung ahung galkaiyin galmite henga ahungin, amaho chutoh kisat din asepaite atiltai. Hitia hi David chun Syria mite toh kisat dinga galmuna asepaite agoldoh phat’in Syria miten jong David chu akisatpi jenguvin ahi.

Israelte masanga konin Syria miten gal alel’uvin ajam kit tauve; hichea hin David chun Syria mite sepai kangtalai tol thei jeng kangtalai sang sagi sepai athat’in, chule keng sepai jeng jeng sang som li athat’in, amaho sepaite lamkai, pipu Shophach kitipa jong chu athat tai.
Hadade’zer sepaiten Israel mite alel hel’u ahitai, ti amudoh phat’uvin David toh kichamna asem’uvin, asoh-in apang gamtauve. Hichejeh hin Syria mite chun Ammon mite chu akithopi kit nom tapouvin ahi.

Chuche kum chavang lai, lengte galbol phat’in Jo’ab chun sepaite apuiyin Ammon mite gamsunga anop apeh-in agachon jengin, hiti hin ahungin Rabbah khopi chu ahin-um tan ahi. Ahin David vang chu gal akonpon, Jerusalem khopia chun aumden tai. Jo’ab hin Rabbah khopi asat chap jengin akhup athal’in ajamtai.

David chun alengpau lallukhuh chu aluchanga konin aho-lhah peh-in, ateleh sana jeng jong talent khat alhingin, asunga chun song man tam jong phabep a um nalaiye; hiche lallukhuh chu David lua akhuh peh tauve. Chujongle akhopi sunga kichomdoh thil kichom ho chu atama tam ahinpon ahi.

Chujongle akhopi sunga cheng miho jong ahinpuidoh soh keiyin, abonchauvin thing-at akipatsah-in, khenchi akipatsahin, chule heicha apen engbolna soh natoh atohsah tai; hitobang hin David chun Ammon mite khopi jouse aboltan ahi. Chujouvin David le mipi abon chauvin Jerusalem khopia ahung kile tauvin ahi.

Hicheng nung hin Gezer khoa Philistine te toh kidouna gal khat ahung umdon kit tai; hiche gal a hin Hu’shath mi Sib’becai kitipa chu masang laiya mihatte son ho lah a mi khat Sippai kitipa chu anathat’e; hijeh chun Philistine mite chu akisu-lhan, mi noiya alut lo tauve.

Hiche nunghin jong Philistine te toh kidouna gal khat ahung soh doh kit’ in ahi; hiche gal a hin Git mi Goliath sopipa Lahmi kitipa chu Ja’ir chapa Elha’nan chun ana that tai; hiche Goliath hi atenglung jeng jong ta-lhang tejen anahi.

Gath khopia jong gal ahung kisat kit tai; hiche khopia chun pasal khat tahsa lentah asang tah khat jong anachenge. Ama hi akhut lang khat cheh a chun akhut jung gup gup akeh cheh-in, akeng phang lang khat cheh a jong keng jung gup gup akeh-e; abonchan akhojung som ni le li alhingin ahi; hichepa jong hi gol lui laiya mihatte son ho lah a mi khatma ahi.
Hiche mihatpa hin Israelte noise tah a abol phat’in David sopipa Shim’e-a chapa Jonathanin athat tai.
Mi hijat atha chengseu hi Gath khopia mihatte phunga peng, ason achilhah jengu ahiuve; mihat hijatpi hi David le asepaite khut luma alousoh keiyuvin ahi.
Israelte dou nan satan ading changmel jengin Israel mijat simtoh din David chu atildoh kit tai.

Hijeh hin David chun Jo’ab le sepai lamkaiho jah a aseiyin, “Cheuven lang Beer-sheba khopia pat Dan khopi geiyin Israel mijat gasimtoh uvin, amijat mong mong kahetdoh theina din kahenga nasimdoh jat jat’u chu hinpolut tauvin,” tin asoltai.

Ahivanginla Jo’ab hin aneljengin, aseitai, “Pakaiyin amite chu ajat ja aja jan be jeng tah ta! Lengpa kapu, amaho jong chu abonchauva kapu nangma soh nalhacha jeng hilou hiuvam? Ipi ding pena kapun hitia amaho mijat hetdoh lou hibanga khoh nasah ding ham? Hitia hi nabola ipi dinga Israelte chunga themmona napoh lut jeng ding hitam?” tin aseiye.
Ahinah vangin lengpa thusei chun Jo’ab thusei adeh lhatan, hijeh chun Jo’ab jong akipat’in Israelte abonchauvin agakholsoh keiyin, Jerusalem khopia ahung kile kit tan ahi.

Hichun Jo’ab chun mipi agasimna lekhabu chu amijat kisun bang bangin abonchan David khut’a apetai. Hichea kisimdoh Israel mi chemjam lamthei cheh chu mihem nel khat le sangja khat alhinguvin, Judah mite jong chemjam lamthei cheh mihem sang ja li le sang som sagi alhinguvin ahi.
Hiche mi kisim lah a hi Jo’ab chun Levi phung mi leh Benjamin phunga mite apansah lou ahi nalaiye; ijeh-inem itileh lengpa thupeh chu Jo’ab din athanghoi behseh jengin ahi.
Hitia mihem jat kisim chung chang thudola hin Pathen jong alunglhai tapon, hijeh chun Israelte abol hesoh-in adeng tai.

Chuphat’in David chun Pathen henga aseiyin, “Keiman hitobang thil pi hi kanabol jengin hichea hin melse tah-in kachonsetai. Hijongleh tua hi nahenga taova kahi, nalhachapa keima themmona hi lamang tan; ajeh chu keiman hiche hi ngol thubuh a kabol ahitai,” ati.
Hichun Pakai injong David dinga mitva neiya pang pa Gad kitipa henga thu ahinseiyin hi tin ati,
“Chenlang David jah a gaseipeh tan, ‘Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Keiman nang kabolpeh thei ding thil thum aume, hicheng lah a chun khatpen pen kilhentan,” ati,’ gatin,” ati.
Hijeh chun Gad jong David henga ahungin ajah a ahung seitai, “Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, ‘Nangin nadei dei kilhen jengin:

kum thum sunga kel lhah ding nadeiyam, nachunga nagalte namelma ho chemjam hung lang jenga lhathum kah a nasuhgam hel ding nadei yam, ahilouva ahileh nithum sunga gamsung pumpia Pakai chemjam gamna hise hung langa, Israel gamgi hop sung apumpia hi Pakai Vantil chun mi asuhgam ding nadeijoh ham?’ tin aseiye. Hijeh chun keima eihinsolpa henga kadonbut theina din ipi kaseipeh ding ham kilhen temin,” ati.

Chuphat’in David chun Gad jah a aseiyin, “Keima kalung ahesoh behseh jeng tai, Pakai khut’a kikhum jeng tange; ajeh chu amihepina akidang behseh jengin ahi; mihem khut’a vang kikhum hih hel ing kate,” ati.
Hijeh chun Pakaiyin Israelte chunga gamna hise ahin lhan ahi; hichea chun Israel mite mihem sang som sagi jen athiuve.

Chuin Pathenin Jerusalem khopi sumang din jong Jerusalem khopia chun Vantil ahinsol’in ahi; ahin asuhmang kon chan Pakaiyin aven ahileh khoh asan, thilse abol ding chung changa alung akhel tai; hijeh chun mi sugam Vantil jah a chun aseipeh-in, “Phaset jeng tante; tun vang nakhut tuh tang tan,” atitai. Pakai Vantil chu Jebus mipa Oman sambuh a anading jing jengin ahi.

David jong chu akhoda a avet leh Pakai Vantil chu lei le van kah a anadin amudoh-in, hiche Vantil chun akhut’a chemjam sadoh san anachoiyin, Jerusalem chung vum lang ngan anachoiye. Chutah chun David le upate abonchauvin khaodip pon jeng akisil’uvin akunsoh kei tauve.

Hichun David’in jong Pathen henga aseiyin, “Mipi jat simtohna dinga thupea chu keima hi kahilou ham? Achonsea chu keima kahin, melse tah-in kachontai. Ahivangin hiche mite kelngoite tobang ho hin ipipen tah abolset khah-u ham? Vo Pakai ka-Pathen, nahenga katao ahitai, kei le ka-inkote dou nan nakhut lamjon lang, namite chunga vang hitobang gamna hise hi lansah hih beh-in,” tin ataotai.
Pakai Vantil chun Gad chu thu aseipeh-in, “David chu chetouva Jebus mipa Oman changphol a chu Pakai henga maicham khat agasem ding ahi,” tin David jah a seipeh din asoltai.
Hijeh chun Gad thusei bangin David jong ache touvin, Pakai min a thu asei chu ajuitai.
Oman kitipa hin suhlou chang anachilpet ahin, akiheiya avet leh Vantil chu amudoh paiyin, aumpi achapate li ho jong chu acham chamin akisel mang soh tauve.

David chu Oman henga ahung phat’in Oman chun aven ahileh David jong amudoh kit tan, hijeh chun achedoh pai paiyin, achangphola konin apotdoh-in David chu salam abol’in tola amai asulut’ in aboh khup tai.

Hichea hin David hin Oman henga athumin, “Hiche nachangphol mun hi keima neipetan, keiman Pakai ding maicham sem nan mang inge, changphol mun hi aman lhingset’in napenang kate; maicham hi kasemdoh a ahileh mipi chunga gamna hise lang hi haidoh thei ding ahi,” tin aseiye.

Chuphat’in Oman chun David jah a aseiyin, “Kilah jengin, kapu lengpan pha nasah bang leh nadei bangin bol jengin; vetan, bongchal teni jong khu pumgo thiltoa manchah a natha dia kapeh nahin, changmol le changhuina kangkui chengse jong khu sago-na ding meiya ti dia kapeh a, hiche suhlou chang jong hi lhosoh thiltoa natodoh jeng dinga kapeh nahitai. Aboncha hi kapeh theng hel nahitan ahi,” ati.

Ahivangin David chu adan Oman jah a aseitai, “Ahipoi, keiman aman kapeh a kachoh tho tei tei ding ahibouve, keiman nangma thil chu moh a kalah a Pakai henga kato-doh lou ding, aman beiya kila thil jongchu pumgo thilto dinga katodoh louhel ding ahi,” ati.
Hiti hin David chun changphol mun man din dangka shekel jagup jen atedoh peh-in Oman chu apetai.

Hikom changphol muna chun David’in jong maicham khat Pakai din asemdoh-in, pumgo thilto tampi leh chamna kilhaina thilto tampi atoh doh-in, Pakai mina ataova ahileh, Pakaiyin David taona chu vana konin meikongin ahinhou jengin maicham chunga thilto chu akatai.
Chu-phat’in Pakaiyin jong Vantil chu aseipeh tan, hijeh chun Vantil jong chun achem-jam apaiya akikhum kit tan ahi.
Hichea Jebus mipa Oman chang-phol’a maicham phunga hin Pakaiyin keima eihin houtai, ti David chun amudoh phat’in hiche maicham phunga chun kilhaina gantha tampi aboltan ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh hiche laiya hi Pakai houbuh, Mose’n gamthip noiya anasemdoh leh pumgo thiltona maicham jeng jong chu Gibeon khopi munthenga kikoi nalai ahi;
ahin hiche geiya che ding chu Pakai Vantil’in chemjam adop jing jeh a David gachea maicham maiya Pathen lungdei gahol hum hal ding kicha geova um-ah ahi.
David chun aseiyin, “Hikoma hi Pakai Pathen houin kisa a, hikom laima ma a hi Israelte dinga pumgo thilto todohna ding maicham kisem ding ahi,” ati.
David’in Israel gamsunga cheng gam-chom mi kiti jouse koukhoma chop khomna dingin thu apen, Pathen houin sahna ding song kheng them miho chu song khengjol dingin apansah tai.
David chun kelkot dung le thih kot dunga thingkila manchah dingin thih jeng jeng kholna ding thil kholna in lentah khat jong asai: chujongle sum-eng jeng jong agih tejou louhel khop’in akholin,
cedar thing ho chulah ajat simjou lou ahijengin; ajeh chu Sidon mite leh Tyre miten David lengpa dingin cedar thing atama tam ahintol lut peh jenguvin ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh David chun aseiyin, “Kachapa Solomon la chapang chabou ahi nalaiyin, ima photoh lou lai mi ahin, hijongle lah Pakai houin ding sahdoh ding houin hi kidang tah le minthang tah, gamtina aloupije kithang soh hel ding ahi; hijeh a chu tua pat’a keiman inthil kajon pat a kagonpat ding ahitai,” ati. Hiti chun David’in athi masangin inthil atama tam anajongdoh tai.
David chun achapa Solomon akou-vin Pakai Israel Pathen houna ding houin khat asahdoh tei teina din phaten athu lhah dim demin ahi.
David’in Solomon jah a aseiyin, “Kacha, keiman Pakai ka-Pathen min a houin khat sahdoh tei teina dinga kalunga kagel jing jeng ahi.

Ahinla Pakaiyin kajah a thu ahin-seiyin, hitin ati, “Nangman gal hahsa tah tah nasat chaiyin, thisan atama tam nasoi; hijeh a chu nangin keima min a houin nasah thei lou ding ahi, ipijeh-inem itileh nangin leiset chunga hin keima mai jenga jong thisan atama tam nasodoh tai.

Vetan, nangman chapa khat nahin ding ahinai; amahi chambol mi hi ding ahi. Ken akimvela chenga melmate chengsea kona chamna kamusah ding ahi; hijeh a chu amin jeng jong Solomon kitia, ama khang sunga hi keiman Israelte chamna kapeh a ol-heova kachensah ding ahi.

Ama hin keima min a houin khat asahdoh ding ahi. Ama hi kachapa hi ding, chule keima apa kahi ding, chutengle Israelte lah a keiman aleng loupi laltouna chu kaphudet peh jing jeng ding ahi,” tin aseiye.
Tun hijeh chun kacha, Pakaiyin napanpi hen lang, aman nang chung chang thudola asei bang bangin nangin jong Pakai na-Pathen houin chu hinsa jou tei tei bouvin.
Pakaiyin bou thil datkhen themna le hetkhen themna nape hen lang, aman Israel chunga vaipoa nakoiya na-nganse phat jong leh Pakai na-Pathen danthu nanit theina dingin nabolpeh jeng hen.

Israelte dinga Pakaiyin Mose henga thu anapeh chonna dan hihen lang chondan jouse hijongleh nanit jingna dinga nachih theiya ahileh nangma naphat touva nakhantou thei ding ahi. Hijeh chun thahat’in lang hangin, kichatna nei louvin lung thoina jong neidan.

Keiman jong genthei hesoh pum pumin Pakai houin sahna dingin sana talent sang ja khat kakholdoh-in, dangka talent nel khat kakholdoh-in, sumengle thih vang ajat tekham val kakhole; ajeh chu atam behseh-a ahi, inthille song jong kakholsoh keiye. Hicheng hi nangman naholbe kit ding ahinalaiye.

Nangman natong ding mihem tamtah nakoi angaitai: song kheng them miho ahin, thing vaibol miho ahin, thing thembol miho ahin, ajat jat a mihem simjou lou hel a khut them mite nakoiya, mi khut them tah tah,
sana lha-them, dangka kheng them, sum-eng lha-them le thih kheng them mi tamtah nakoi ding ahi. Kipat’in lang na tong pan tan! Pakaiyin napanpi jing jeng hen!” ati.
David chun Israelte lamkai hochengse jong chu thu apen achapa Solomon akithopi diuvin ahil’in hitin aseiye,

“Pakai na-Pathen’uvin nang ho napanpi jingu hi lou ham? Aman jet le veiya kona jong nagalteu asuh thip’a chamna napeh-u hilou ham? Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin agamsunga cheng mite chu keima khut’a eipehdoh a, hijeh a chu agamsung pumpi hi Pakai angsung le amite masanga kisu-lha a mi noiya kison kunsoh ahitai.

Tun nalungthim le nahinkho pumpiuva Pakai na-Pathenu hol ding ngaitouvin. Chule kipatdoh uvin lang Pakai Pathen din muntheng ding houin sauvin; chutileh Pakai kitepna thingkong le Pathen houina manchah bel le um theng, thilkeo theng ho chu hitobanga Pakai dinga houin kisadoh sunga chu hung kipolut thei ding ahi,” ati.
David chu atehset behseh jenga ahinkho alhin phat’in achapa Solomon chu Israelte chunga leng chang din asemtai.
David chun Israelte lamkai chengse leh thempuho toh chule Levi miho chu abonchauvin akoukhomsoh keiyin ahi.
Levi miho chu kum somthuma lhah chung lam bou kisim ahiuvin, aboncha amijat mong mongu chu mihem sang somthum le sang set alhinguvin ahi.
David chun, “Mihem hijat lah a mi sang som ni le sang li chu Pakai houin sahna ding chung changa natoh vaihomin pangu hen lang, mi sang gup chu vaibol ding le thutan din pangu hen;

mi sang li chu kelkot dung ngah-in pangu hen lang, chutengle mi sang li ma chu keiman Pakai vahchoi tengleh manchah dinga kasemsa manchah ho hi mangu hen Pakai vahchoina le thangvahna thou hen,” atin ahi.
Hitobang hin David chun miho hi Levi chapate a tam le alhom dungjuiyun aloi loiyin ahom khensoh-in ahi. Akihop danu chu Gershom loi, Kohath loi chule Merar’i loi, tia kihom ahiuve.
Gershom chapa teni chu Ladan le Shim’e-i ahilhonin;
Ladan chapate lah a Jehi’el chu aupa pen ahin, chule Zetham le Jo’el pumin mi thum ahiuvin ahi.
Shim’e-i chapate jong Shelo’moth le Ha ‘zi-el toh chule Haran toh ahiuvin mi thum alhinguve. Mi hicheng hi Ladan insung kon lah a apu apauva phung upa cheh anahiuvin ahi.
Shim’e-i chapate adang jong chu Jahath ahin, Zina ahin, Je’ush ahin chule Beri’ah toh ahiuve. Mi hicheng li jong hi Shim’e-i chapate ahiuvin ahi.
Jahath kitipa hi aupapen ahin, anilhinna Zizah ahin, Je’ush le Beri’ah hin chapa tampi anei lhon loujehin pa khat lhah insung khatseh danin akisimtai.
Kohath chapte chu Amram le Izhar toh, Hebron le Uz’ziel ahiuvin abonin mi li ahiuve.

Amram chapa teni chu Aaron le Mose ahilhone. Aaron hi thil theng chung nung pen thenso dingin atumbeh-in akilhengdoh tan, hitia hi ama le achapaten aitih chan geiya jong Pakai angsunga gimnamtui ahalnam’uva, Pakai kin jeng abol diu, chule tonsot geiya Pakai min apat’uva mi phatthei aboh boh jeng diuva kinganse ahitauve.
Pathen mipa Mose chapate vang chu Levi phunga akisimtha tauvin ahi.
Mose chapa teni chu Gershom le Elie’zer ahilhone.
Gershom chapate lah a aupapen chu Sheb’uel ahi.
Elie’zer chapa khatseh ahin Rehabi’ah ahi; ama hi insung upa jong ahitai; Elie’zer hin chapa dang aneipon, Rehabi’ah chapate vang atama tam ahiuve.
Izhar chapate lah a aupapen jong chu Shelo’mith ahi.
Hebron chapate chu aupapen Jeri’ah ahin, aban a pa Amari’ah ahin, Jaha’ziel chu athum lhinna ahin, chule Jekame’am kitipa chu li lhinna ahi.
Uz’ziel chapate lah a jong aupa pen Micah ahin, anilhinna pa Isshi’ah ahi.
Merar’i chapa teni chu Mahli le Mushi ahilhone. Mahli chapa teni Elea’zar le Kish ahilhonin ahi.
Elea’zar hin chanu jeng ahingin, chapa hing louvin athitai; achanu ho chu asopiteu Kish chapaten akichen piuvin ahi.
Mushi chapate chu Mahli le Eder toh chule Jeremoth ahiuvin mi thum ahiuve.

Mihem hicheng hi apateu insung dol’a Levi chapate ahiuvin, Pakai insung kinbolna natonga pang thei mi kum som nia lhah chung lamse se achang changa aminu kisundoh dungjuiya ama ama pajang lhah ainsung cheh a phung upa cheh ahiuve.
Ijeh-inem itileh David chun aseiyin, “Pakai Israel Pathen chun amite hi chamna apeh ahitai; chujongle ama hi Jerusalem khopia aitih chan geiya cheng jing jeng ahiye,
Hijeh a chu Levi miho hin jong houbuh le athilkeo manchah ho hi apoh le kit louhel diu ahitai,” ati.
Ajeh chu David thusei anukhah pen a kum som nia lhah chung lam kisimdoh Levi mite jat chu hicheng hi anahi.

Amaho toh ding akinu chu Pakai houin sunga Aaron chapate akithopiuva amaho khela pangji ji diu, lhong dung jouse le indan sung dung jouse avet tup’uva, thil theng jouse atheh ngim jing jeng diu ahin, ipi hijongle Pakai houin sunga bol ding kin tapou chu abol diu ahi;

changlhah agol gola kigol ding jong chu agol’uva, lhosoh thiltoa man ding changbong jong angaitouva, cholsolou changlhah a sem ding changbong neldisel jong angaito diu, thaotwi toh kihala changlhah kansa a kitohdoh thilto jong avet tup’uva, ajat tetoh ding hihen lang alet aneo tetoh ding hijongleh amahon apoh diu ahi.
Chujongleh amaho hi jingkah seh leh dinguva Pakai athangvah uva avahchoi diu, chutobang banga chu nilhah seh jongleh abol diu ahi;

hitia hi cholngah nikho dung le lhathah nikho dunga jong chule kut nikho dung jongleh Pakaiya pumgo thilto akitodoh ni nileh amaho hi amijat akidei khoh jat dungjuiya tat le tat louva Pakai angsunga pang jing jeng ding ahiuve.
Hitobanga hi amahon kikhopna ponbuh kinbol le muntheng kinbol atho diu, Aaron chapate akithopiuva, Pakai houina natoh kinbol chung changa asopiteu Aaron chapate chu ahu jing jeng diu ahiye,” ati.
Aaron chapate chu hitia hi kihom khen khen ahiuve: Aaron chapate chu Nadab ahin, Abi’hu ahin, Elea’zar le Ith’amar toh ahiuve.
ahin Nadab le Abi’hu hi apa sangin jong athi masa lhontan, cha neilouvin athi lhon tai; hijeh chun Elea’zar le Ith’amar hi thempun ahung pang lhonin ahi.
Elea’zar chapate lah a Zadok le Ith’amar chapate lah a Ahim’elech kithopi vangin David chun amaho hi atoh ding dol’u akin’uva pang din agol toh soh keiyin apansah tai.

Ith’amar chapate lah sanga Elea’zar chapate lah a mi upa atamjep jeh uvin, Elea’zar chapate lah a chun apu apau insung lhah dol cheh-in lamkai som le gup alhengdoh uvin, amaho lamkaina noiya aum’uvin chule Ith’amar chapate ding chun lamkai miget bou alhengdoh uvin ahi.

Akilhengdoh a akipansah chengse hi kibang banga vang kisan cheh a kipansah ahiuvin, hitobanga akibolna a kona hi Elea’zar chapate lah le Ith’amar chapate lah a kona munthenga lamkai vaibol ding le Pathen natohna vaibol ding mi jong tampi umdoh ahiuve.

Levi mi Nethan’el chapa danthu lekha them Shemai’ah kitipan amaho chengse hi lengpa mai le milen milalte angsung, Zadok thempupa angsung le Abi’athar chapa Ahim’elech angsung laitah le thempuho le Levi miho apu apateuva phung upa chengse angsunga lekhan asun lut soh keiyin ahi; pajang khat lhahse se chu Elea’zar insung lhah a kilhengdoh a chule pajang khat lhah ma chu Ith’amar insung dia kilhengdoh ahitai.
Vang kisan amasapen chu Jehoi’arib chunga achun, anilhin na Jeda’iah chunga achun,
thum lhinna Harim chunga achun, li lhinna Se-o ‘rim chunga achun,
nga lhinna Malehi’jah chunga achun, gup lhinna Mij’amin chunga achun,
sagi lhinna Hakkoz chunga achun, get lhinna Abi’jah chunga achun,
ko lhinna Jeshua chunga achun, som lhinna Shecani’ah chunga achun,
som le khat lhinna chu Eli’ashib chunga achun, som le ni lhinna chu Jakim chunga achun,
som le thum lhinna chu Huppah chunga achun, som le li lhinna chu Jesheb’e-ab chunga achun,
som le nga lhinna chu Bilgah chunga achun, som le gup lhinna chu Immer chunga achun,
som le sagi lhinna chu Hezir chunga achun, som le get lhinna chu Hap’pizzez chunga achun,
som le ko lhinna chu Pethahi’ah chunga chun, som ni lhinna chu Jehez’kel chunga achun,
som ni le khat lhinna chu Jachin chunga achun, som ni le ni lhinna chu Gamul chunga achun,
som ni le thum lhinna chu Dela’iah chunga achun, som ni le li lhinna chu Ma-azi’ah chunga achui.

Mihem hijat jat hin akipansah na dungjuiyun ama ama toh ding cheh aneiyun, Pakai houin sunga ahung lut tengu leh Pakai Israel Pathenin apu u Aaron anathupeh dungjuiyin, chule Aaron in amaho toh ding dola agondoh bang bangin atoh ding dol kigong cheh chu atong jiuvin ahi.
Levi chapate adang ho ahileh: Amram chapate lah a Shu’ba-el ahin, Shu’ba-el chapate lah a Jehde’iah ahi;
Rehabi’ah chapate ahiuleh: Rehabi’ah chapate lah a Isshi’ah chu aupapen ahi.
Izhar chapte lah a Shelo’moth ahin, Shelo’moth chapate lah a Jahath ahi.
Hebron chapate ahiuleh: Jeri’ah kitipa chu aupa pen ahin, a ban a anilhinna pa Amari’ah ahin, thum lhinna pa chu Jahazi’el ahin, li lhinna pa chu Jekame’am ahi.
Uz’ziel chapate lah a Micah ahin, Micah chapate lah a Shamir ahi.
Micah sopipa chu Isshi’ah ahin, Isshi’ah chapate lah a Zechari’ah ahi.
Merar’i chapa teni chu Mahli le Mushi ahilhone. Ja-azi’ah chapate lah a Beno ahi.
Merar’i chapate chu Ja-azi’ah chapate ahiuleh Beno le Shoham toh, Zaccur le Ibri ahiuve.
Mahil chapa ahileh: Elea’zar ahin, ama hin chapa ahing poi.
Kish a kon Kish chapate lah a Jerah’meel ahiye.
Mushi chapate chu Mahli le Eder toh chule Jer’imoth ahiuve. Hichengse hi Levi mite chapa, apu apau lhah a ama ama insung kailhah dungjui cheh a kisimdoh ahiuvin ahi.

Amaho jong hin ama ama pajang lhah insung dung cheh-in asopiteu umchan bang bangin Aaron chapate chonna athouvin, David lengpa angsung le Zadok masang, Ahim’elech le thempuho apu apau insung dol cheh a chule Levi miho masanga chun vang akisan soh keiyun ahi.

David le natohna houin kinbolna lamkai pipu hon houin kinbolna pang din Asaph chapate phabep le Heman chapate phabep toh chule Jedu’thun chapate phabep chu alhengdoh uvin, amaho hin themgao ho chutoh kithouva semjang asaiyuva, selangdah asai diu, chutengleh khutbeh abeh diu ahi. Hikoma natonga pang chengse chu abonchan aminu akijih doh soh keiyin ahi.
Asaph chapate chu Zaccur, Joseph, Nethani’ah, chule Ashare’lah ahiuve; hiche Asaph chapate hin Asaph lamkaina a lengpa thusah dungjuiyin Asaph-in alamkaiyin gaothu aseiyui

Jedu’thun a kon, Jedu’thun chapate chu Gedali’ah le Zeri toh, Jesha’iah le Shim’e-i toh, Hashabi’ah le Mattithi’ah toh ahiuvin abonin mi gup alhinguvin, amaho hi apau Jedu’thun hin alamkaiyin semjang asaiyuvin gaothu aseiyun, Pakai athangvah uvin chule avahchoi uvin ahi.

Heman a kondoh, Heman chapate chu Bukki’ah le Mattani’ah toh, Uz’ziel le Shebu’el toh, Jer’imoth le Hanani’ah toh, Hana’ni le Eli’athah toh, Giddal’ti le Romam’ti-e’zer toh, Joshbekash’ah le Mallo’thi le Hothir toh chule Maha’zi-oth ahiuve.

Mi hicheng hi lengpa dinga mitva neiya pangpa Heman chapate jeng ahiuvin, amaho hin Pathen thutep dungjuiya sumkon amut ging jiu ahi; ijeh-inem itileh Pathenin Heman hi chapa som le li ahinsah-in, chanu jong thum ahinsah-e.

Amaho hi abonchauva apau lamkaina a Pakai houin sunga chu tumging thei tum leh khutbeh benga panguva, selangdah le semjang asai jiuva, Pathen houina kinbol lhacha pang jiu ahiuve. Asaph le Jedu’ thun toh chule Heman chu lengpa chutoh kikhutjop ahiuvin, lengpa thua chon ahiuve.
Pakai vahchoina la sa dinga kithem chuh mong mong mi chu amaho ahiuvin asopiteu ahin, abon bonin mihem lathem chengse ja ni le som get le get alhinguvin ahi.
Mi hijat pi hi atoh ding akinu chung changa atoh ding dol cheh kiphotna din alen aneo, mihil a pang le simlai kibang cheh-in vang akisan’uvin ahi.
Asaph dinga vang kisan amasapen chu Joseph chunga achui; anilhinna chu Gedali’ah le asopite toh chule achapate mi som le ni chunga achun,
thum lhinna chu Zaccur le achapate chule asopite mi som le ni chunga achui;
li lhinna chu Izri le achapate toh asopite mi som le ni chunga ahung chun,
nga lhinna chu Nethani’ah le achapate toh chule asopite mi som le ni chunga achui;
gup lhinna chu Bukki’ah le achapate toh chule asopite mi som le ni chunga achun,
sagi lhinna chu Jeshare’lah leh achapate toh asopite mi som le ni chunga achui;
get lhinna chu Jesha’iah le achapate toh chule asopite mi som le ni chunga achun,
ko lhinna chu Mattani’ah le achapate toh chule asopite mi som le ni chunga achui;
som lhinna chu Shim’e-i le achapate toh chule asopite mi som le ni chunga achun,
som le khat lhinna chu Az’arel le achapate mi som le ni chunga achui;
som le ni lhinna chu Hashabi’ah le achapate toh chule asopite mi som le ni chunga achun.
som le thum lhinna chu Shu’bael le achapate toh chule asopite mi som le ni chunga achui;
som le li lhinna chu Mattithi’ah le achapate toh chule asopite mi som le ni chunga achun,
som le nga lhinna chu Jer’emoth le achapate toh chule asopite mi som le ni chunga achui:
som le gup lhinna chu Hanani’ah le achapate toh chule asopite mi som le ni chunga achun,
som le sagi lhinna chu Joshbekash’ah le achapate toh chule asopite. mi som le ni chunga achui;
som le get lhinna chu Hana’ni le achapate toh chule asopite mi som le ni chunga achun,
som le ko lhinna chu Mallo’thi le achapate toh chule asopite mi som le ni chung achui;
som ni lhinna chu Eli’athah le achapate toh chule asopite mi som le ni chunga achun,
som ni le khat lhinna chu Hothir le achapate toh chule asopite mi som le ni chunga achui;
som ni le nilhinna chu Giddal’ti le achapate toh chule asopite mi som le ni chunga achun,
som ni le thum lhinna chu Maha’zi-oth le achapate toh chule asopite mi som le ni chunga achui;
som ni le li lhinna chu Romam’ti-e’zer le achapate toh chule asopite mi som le ni chungma achun ahi.
Kelkot ngah a pang ho kihop khendol chu: Korah chate lah-a Ko’re chapa Meshelemi’ah chu ahin, ama jong hi Asaph chapate lah a mi khatma ahiye.
Meshelemi’ah kitipa hin chapa phabep ahingin, apeng masapen pa Zechari’ah ahin, anilhinna pa Jedi’a-el ahin, thum lhinnapa Zebadi’ah ahin, li lhinna pa Jath-ni’el ahi.
Nga lhinna pa chu Elam ahin, gup lhinna pa Jeho’ha’nan ahin, chule sagi lhinna pa chu El’ie-ho-e’nai ahi.
O’bed-e’dom jong chun chapa phabep ahingin, amaho chu apeng masapen Shemai’ah ahin, ni lhinna pa Jehoz’abad ahin, thum lhinna pa Jo’ah ahin, li lhinna pa Sachar ahin, nga lhinna pa Nethan’el ahi.
Gup lhinna pa Am’mi-el ahin, sagi lhinna pa Is’sachar ahin, get lhinna pa Pe-ul’tethai ahin, amapa hi Pathenin phatthei anaboh mong mong ahiye.

Chujongle ama chapa Shemai’ah kitipa jong chun chapate phabep ahingin, amaho jong hi apu apateu insung lhah cheh a avaihomin apangsoh hel’uvin ahi; ijeh-inem itileh amaho hi boltheina neitah mihem jeng ahiuvin ahi.
Shemai’ah chapate chu Othni te Reph’a-el toh, Obed le Elza’bad ahiuvin, asopite niu jong boltheina neitah migel ahilhonin, ama ni chu Eli’hu te Semachi’ah ahilhone.

Mihem hijat hi O’bed-e’dom chapate jeng ahiuvin, achapateu toh chule asopi chengseu toh ahiuve; abonchauva hi boltheina neitah mihem jeng le natong dinga nganse thei jeng mi ahiuvin, O’bede’dom chapate jeng jeng chu som gup le ni alhinguve.
Meshelemi’ah jong hin chapa phabep le sopi phabep aneiyin, thilbol theitah cheh jong ahiuvin abonin mihem som le get ahiuve.
Merar’i chapate lah a Hosah kitipa jong chun chapa phabep aneiyin, aupapen chu Shimri ahin, ama hi apeng masapen ahilou vanga a pan aupapena apansah ahitai:
ani lhinna pa Hilki’ah ahin, thum thinna pa Tebali’ah ahin, li thinna pa Zechari’ah ahin, abon bonin Hosah chapate leh asopite chengse chu mihem som le thum alhinguvin ahi.

Hitobanga kelkot ngah ho akihop khen banguva hi Pakai houin sunga lhacha kinbolna dinga asopiteu bang banga lamkai anei soh keiyu ahin, chujongle atoh diu kin chutoh kitoh a kihom khen soh kei ahiuve.
Chutengle amaho hin alen aneo kibang cheh le tang gol’in pajang lhah insung dungjui cheh chun apanna diu ketkot phunga dingin vang akisan cheh jiuvin ahi.

Niso lam kelkot’a pang ding vang kisan chu Shelemi’ah chunga ahung chun ahi. Mihon achapa Zechari’ah kitipa, miching tah mihilguh a pang pa dingin jong vang asan’uvin ahileh, ama panna ding vang kisan chu sahlam kelkot a din aphai.
O’bed-e’dom dinga vang kisan chu lhanglam kelkot phunga panna din aphan, chule achapate dingih thil khotna in kelkot nga na din aphai:

Shuppim le Hosah panna dingin nilhum lang kelkot phunga panna din aphan ahi: Shal’lecheth kelkot kiti chu ahin, lamlen kitou lhun na lang chu ahiye. Hikoma hi kotngah pa chu kihei thip thep’a um ding ahi.

Niso lam kelkot phunga chu nisim niseh le mi gup gup panguva, sahlam kelkot phunga jong nisim niseh le mi li li pangji ahiuvin, lhanglam kelkot phunga jong mi li li ma nisim niseh a panguva, thil kholna in kelkot’a chu hitobang banga hi mi ni ni ajet aveiya pangji ahiuve.
Nilhum lam parbar phunga dingin lamlen laiya mi li apanguvin, chule parbar laitah a chun mi ni apanguve.
Hitobang banga hi kelkot dung ngah a pang ding Korah chapate lah a miho leh Merar’i chapate kihop khendol ahi.
Levi mite lah a Ahi’jah kitipa hin Pathen houina thil kikhol jouse le leh Pathena thit kitohdohsa akithensosa chengse chu avetup’in apon apange.
Gershon phunga peng, Ladan phung khaiya hung lenglha achapate ho, Ladan chapate chengse chun Gershon chilhah Ladan insunga ainsung jouseu upa ding chun Jehi’eli chate jeng apansah uvin ahi.
Jehi’eli chapa teni Zetham le asopipa Jo’el chu Pakai houin sunga thit kikholdoh chengse vetup dingin apang lhonin ahi.
Amram chate le Izhar chate, Hebron chate chule Uz’ziel chate ahiuleh:
Mose tupa, Gershom chapa Sheb’uel kitipa hi thil kikhol jouse chunga vaibol pipun apangin ahi.
A sopite ahiuleh: Elie’zer sunga peng achapa Rehabi’ah ahin, Rehabi’ah chapa Jesh’a-iah ahi; Jesh’a-iah chapa Joram ahin, Joram chapa Zichri ahi: Zichri chapa Shelo’moth ahiye.

Hiche Shelo’moth kitipa hileh asopite chengse chu thil kitohdohsa kithensosa chengse, David lengpa le apu apauva aphung sunguva insung upa chengse toh chule sepai asang sang vaibol lamkai le aja ja vaibol lamkaiya pang hon atodoh-u thil kikhol chengse vetup din apanguvin ahi:
Galmuna kichomdoh thilkeo chengse chu mihon Pakai houin kinbolna manchah dingin thilton apeuvin athenso jiuvin ahi.

Chujongle mitva neipa Samuel le Kish chapa Saul, Ner chapa Abner chule Zeru’iah chapa Jo’ab kitipan Pathena atodohsau thil kitoh chengse chu ahin, aboncha hitobang thenso sa thilto ho hi Shelo’moth le asopiten avetup’uvin ahi.
Izhar chilhah achate lah a chun Chenani’ah leh achapate chu Israelte dinga polam kinjouse’po din aki nganseuvin, amaho hi vaibol le thutanin apanguvin ahi.

Hebron chate lah a Hashabi’ah le asopite chengse chu mihem thil bolthei cheh sang khat le ja sagi alhinguvin, amaho hi itobang hijongle Pakai kin bol ding leh lengpa dinga natoh thei chan tong dingin Jordan vadung nilhum lam gamkaiya Israelte natoh vetup din apanguvin ahi.

Hebron chate lah a chun aphung sunga akhanggui kisim dol chu iti ti kisim jeng jong leh apu apauva ainsung jouseuva Jeri’jah kitipa chu aupapen in apangin ahi. David leng chan kal kum som li lhin kum chun mihem akikhol toh-in ahileh, Gilead gamsunga Jazer khopia chun mipi lah a mihem thil boltheina nasa tah tah neiya tampi amudoh uvin ahi.

David lengpan jong amaho hi asopiteu pum pumin alhengdoh paiyin, mihem thilbol thei cheh sang ni le ja sagi jen chu phung upa cheh le ainsunguva jong alamkai cheh ahiuvin, amaho hi Reuben chate le Gad chate chule Manas’seh phung akeh ho vetup din apansah-in, Pathen dinga natoh jouse leh lengpa chung chang thusoh jouse vetup dingin angansen ahi.

Israel chate akisimdol chu hiti ahi. Ainsung cheh uva upa chengse ahin, sepai asang sang lamkai ho leh aja ja lamkai ho ahiuvin, danthu lekha them ho jong ahiuvin, amaho hin mipi lah a chu atoh ding dol cheh atoh jiu ahi. Hitobanga aloi loiya akiloi nauva hi lengpa insung kin bola kilhaji ahiuve. Loi khat chu lha khat sunga panguva, hitobanga hi kum khat sunga kilha lha jeng ahiuvin ahi. Mihem loi khat khat’a kiloikhom chu sang som ni le sang li li alhinguve.
Zab’di-el chapa Jasho’beam chu loi masapen lamkaiyin apangin lha masapena natong ahiuve; ama loi ho mihem sang som ni le sang li alhinguvin ahi.
Jasho’beam kitipa hi Perez chilhah mi khat ahin, chutengle lha masapena sepaite lamkai jouse chunga apipu pen a pang ahiye.
Ahoh chate lah a mi Dodai kitipa hi lha ni lhinna a loi ni lhinna ho lamkaiyin apange; ama lamkai loiho jong mihem sang som ni le sang li ma ahiuve.
Lha thum lhinna loi thum lhinna ho lamkaiya pang chu thempupa Jehoi’ada chapa Bena’iah ahin, ama hi lamkai pipu pen tah ahi; ama loi ho jong hi mihem sang som ni le sang li alhinguvin ahi.
Hiche Bena’iah kitipa hi mihat som thum lah a mihatpa chu ahin, mihat som thum ho lamkaiya pang ahi; am a loiho chu achapa Ammiz’abad kitipan alamkaiyin ahi.
Jo’ab sopipa, As’ahel chu loi li lhinna lamkai ahin, lha li lhin nan apangin, chule achapa Zebadi’ah kitipa chun anung ajuiyin ahi; ama loiho jong hi mihem sang som ni le sang li ma alhinguvin ahi.
Lha nga lhinna loi nga lhinna lamkaipa chu Izrah chate lah a Shamhuth kitipa chu ahi; ama loiho jong mihem sang som ni le sang li alhinguve.
Loi gup lhinna, lha gup lhinna pang chu Tekoa khoa mi Ikkesh chapa Ira ahi; ama loiho jong mihem sang som ni le sang li ma alhinguvin ahi.
Loi sagi lhinna, lha sagi lhinna pang chu Ephraim chapate lah a Pel’on chilhah Helez kitipa chu ahin, ama loiho jong mihem sang som ni le sang li alhinguve.
Loi get lhinna, lha get lhinna pang chu Ze’rah chilhah lah a Hu’shath mi Sib’becai kitipa chu ahin, ama loiho jong mihem sang som ni le sang li ma alhinguvin ahi.
Loi ko lhinna, lha ko lhinna pang chu Benjamin chilhah ho lah a mi An’athoth khoa hung kon Abi-e’zer kitipa chu ahin, ama loiho jong mihem sang som nile sang li alhingin ahi.
Lol som lhinna, lha som lhinna pang chu Zerah chilhah mite lah a Netoph’-ah khoa mi Ma’harai kitipa chu ahin, ama loiho lah a jong mihem sang som ni le sang li alhinguvin ahi.
Loi som le khat lhinna, lha som le lha khat lhinna pang chu Ephraim chapate lah a Pir’athon khoa mi, Bena’iah kitipa chu ahin, ama loiho jong mihem sang som ni le sang li ma alhinguve.
Loi som le loi ni lhinna, lha som le lha ni lhinna pang chu Oth’ni-el chilhah mite lah a Netoph’ath khoa mi Heldai ahin, ama loiho jong mihem sang som ni le sang li alhinguvin ahi.
Israelte phung sunga Reuben chate din Zichri chapa Elie’zer kitipa chu vaibol pi pun apange; Simeon chate lamkai din Ma’acah chapa Shephati’ah kitipa chu apangin ahi;
Levi phung din Kem’uel chapa Hashabi’ah apangin, Aaron phunga din Zadok apange;
Judah phunga din David sopite lah a Eli’hu kitipa apangin, Is’sachar phunga din Michael chapa Omri apange;
Zeb’ulun phunga din Obadi’ah chapa Ishma’iah apangin, Naph’tali phunga din Az’riel chapa Jer’emoth apange;
Ephraim phunga din Azazi’ah chapa Hoshe’a apangin, Manas’seh phung keh din Peda’iah chapa Jo’el apange;
Gilead gamsunga Manas’seh phung keh khat din Zechari’ah chapa Iddo apangin, Benjamin phunga din Abner chapa Ja-asi’el’ chapa apange;
Dan phunga din Jero’ham chapa Az’arel apangin, abonchauvin mi hijat hi Israel phung jouse lamkaiyin apang soh keiyuvin ahi.
Pakaiyin Israelte hi van a ahsite jat kaphahsah ding ahi, tia thutep aneijeh-in David’in jong mihem asim chun kum som nia lhah noilam mi anasim thapoi.

Zeru’iah chapa Jo’ab chun mijat asimpat ahitan, ahivangin asimsoh manta poi; hichan geiyin jong asimpat tah chun Israelte chunga lungsatna ahung lhungin, akisimdohsa chengse jong chu amijat mong mong David lengpa thusimbua akijih mantapon ahi.

Lengpa thil kholna thilkeo ho ngah din Ad’i-el chapa Az’maveth kitipa chu anapangin, chule gamsung pumpia thil kikhol jouse, khopi dunga hihen lang khocha dunga hitaleh, kulpi insang kisadoh dunga ahivangin aboncha vetup din Uzzi’ah chapa Jonathan anapange;
chutengle loulai dunga loukaiya pang ho leithao semtoh ho vetup din Chelub chapa Ezri chu apangin,
chutengleh lengpilei jouse vetup dingin Ra’math khoa mi Shim’e-i apangin ahi; chule lei noiya lengpiga khol’a lengpitwi hidoh sahna ding vaibol’in Shepham khoa mi Zabdi chu apange.
Chule phai dunga Olive thing ho le theipi thing ho vetup din Geder khoa mi Ba’alha’nan apangin, thaotwi kikhol chengse vetup dingin Jo’ash apange.
Sharon phaiya kivah bong ho vetup din Sharon khoa mi Shitrai chu apangin, chule phai dunga bong kivah ho vetup din Adlai chapa Shaphat apange.
Sangongsao sese vetup dingin Ishmael mi Obil apangin, sanganpi chengse vetup dingin Meron’oth khoa mi Jehde’iah apange. Kelngoi hon jouse vetup din Hagar mi Jaziz kitipa chu apangin ahi.
Mihem hijatpi hi David lengpa nei athilkeo jouse chinga pang neiching mijeng ahiuvin ahi.
David pa-ngah, Jonathan kitipa hi miching tah le thil umdol hekhen them, chule lekha themtah ahi; ama le Hach’moni chapa Jehi’el kitipa chun lengpa chapate ahilji lhona alimlo asisah lhon ahi.
Ahith’ophel kitipa chu lengpa lungthim pea panga ahilguh ji ahin, Arch khoa mi Hushai kitipa chu lengpa dinga ajolpa ahi.
Ahith’ophel hi Bena’iah chapa Jehoi’ada le Abi’athar chun akheldoh lhontai. Jo’ab chu lengpa sepaite lamkaiya pang ahi.

David chun Jerusalem khopia kikhopna khat asemin, Israelte vaibol a pang jouse, lengpa kinbola pang aloi loiya kihom khen sepaite lamkaiho, sepai asang sang lamkaiya pang ho leh sepai aja ja lamkaiya pang ho jong, thilkeo chinga pang ho leh, gancha jouse leh lengpa chapate vetup’a pang ho jouse jong, leng inpia vaibola pang ho le mihatte jouse ahiuvin, aphat phat’a sepaiya kipansah galhang jouse jong akousoh keiye.

Chutah chun David lengpa jong akipatdoh paiyin akeng phang te nin ading chah kheh jengin aseitai, “Kathusei ngaiyuvin, kasopite kajat mite. Keiman kalungthim a hi Pakai kitepna thingkong kicholdona ding houin khat sahdoh tei tei dinga kagel jing jeng ahin, hiche houin mun chu Pathen Khoto ngapna mun hi ding, tia keiman hiche houin dinga hi thil kagonpan ahitai.
Ahinla Pathenin keijah a aseiyin, ‘Nangin keima houin ding keima min a nasah thei lou ding ahibouve, ajeh chu nang hi gal-hat mi nahin, thisan tampi nasoi,’ eiti.

Ahivangin Pakai Israel Pathenin keima hi ka-inkote lah a kona Israel chunga leng changjing jeng dia eilhendoh ahitai; ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin Judah chu lamkai dinga analhendoh a, kapa penna Judah insunga chu alamkaiya anakoi ahin, chule ka-inkote kapa insungmite lah a jong kei chunga lung lhaina aneiya achapate lah a chu kei hi Israel mite jouse chunga leng chansah ding eina dei ahiye.
Chule Pakaiyin keima chapa tampi eineisahna lah a jong hin Solomon kei chapa hi Israel chunga Pakai lenggam sunga laltouna tou dingin alhengdoh tan ahi.

Pakaiyin keijah a anaseiyin, ‘Hiche nachapa Solomon hin kei dinga houin eisah peh a indan tampi eisunpeh ding ahi, ajeh chu keiman ama hi kachapa hidinga kalhendoh a, keijong ama dinga apa kahi ding ahi.

Ama lenggam hi atonsot geiya dinga keiman kaphudet peh a, chule aman jong tulaiya achonna bang banga hi keima thupeh chengse le kachondan jouse abonchan long louhela anit jing jeng ding ahi,’ tin aseiye.

Hijeh chun tun Israel pumpi mitmu leh Pakai Houbung pumpi maiya, i-Pathenu jah phahna ahin Pakai na-Pathenu thupeh abonchan nit jinguvin lang hol jing jenguvin; chutileh nanghon hiche gamsung phatah hi nalouva, chule nang ho nunga hung cheng ding nachateu jong agoulo diuva nadalhah peh thei diu ahi.

“Kachapa Solomon, nangman Pathen napa dinga a-Pathen chu he jing jengin lang, nalungthim pumpi leh nalunggel thanom tah-in ama kin jeng bol’in: ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin mi lungthim jouse akholtoh jin, thilgon jouse leh lung ngaito jouse abonchan ahesoh kei jin ahi. Ama chu nahol’a ahileh nangman namudoh tei tei ding ahin, ijemtia ama hi nasuhmila ahivangleh aman tonsot geiya nangma napaidoh jeng ding ahi.
Kivet themin tuhin, ajeh chu Pakaiyin nangma hi munthenga man ding houin khat sadoh dinga nalhendoh ahitai; thahat’in lang houin chu sadoh teiyin,” ati.

David chun achapa Solomon chu houin hongcha kigondol leh ain jouse kigondol, thil kholna mun ding kigondol, indan chung nung kisemdol, indan sung nung kisemdol, chule hepitouna indan kisemdol jouse a pen ahi;

Pakai houin indan lhong dung kisem ding dol alunggila agelsa jouse ahin, akimvela indan kigong ho ahin, Pakai houin sunga thil kholna kigong ho jong, katdohsa thilto ho kikholna dingjong avetsah soh keiyin;

thempu loi kihop khen ding dol ahin, Levi miho kihop khen ding dol ahin, Pakai houin sunga houin kinbol ding dol jouse avetsah soh keiyin ahi: Pakai houin sunga kinbolna manchah ding kong le bel ho jouse ahin.
kin khat cheh boldohna dinga kong le bel sana jenga semdoh dinga kikhol sana jong atedoh peh jengin, kin khat cheh bolna dinga dangka akhol jat jong kong le bel a sem dingin atedoh peh tai;

sana thaomei khom gih dan le athaomei chengse agih dan atetoh peh-in, thaomei khom khat cheh agih dolleh athaomei ho agih dol atetoh peh soh keiyin, dangka thaomei khom ding le athaomei chengse ding agih dol jong atetoh peh-in, kinbol lengle kimang ding thaomei khom khat kigong dungjuiyin abol’in ahi.
Changlhah kitohdoh ho kigolna ding sana dokhang ding jong agih ding dol atetohin, chule dangka dokhang ding jong atetoh peh-in ahi:

sumkhe manchah ding sumkhe ka-nei dingjong sana thengsel ahin, kisilna kong ding ahin, chule khon ho ding jong ahi: sana khon ho leh khat cheh a agih dol ding jong atetoh-in, dangka khon ho jong chu khat cheh gih ding dol atetoh-e;

gimnamtui halnamna ding sana kilhajol maicham ding jong ahin, agih ding dol jong atetoh peh-in, chujongle athilgon lah a hin sana kangtalai khat jong ahin, hichea hi Cherub lim ho chu kisema alhaving ajah soh keiyuva Pakai kitepna thingkong chu alhauva akhu khum diu ahi.
Thilgon hijatpi hi David chun akisemdoh ding dol Pakaiyin akhut tah a ajih doh peh bang banga, agon banga anatoh ding jouse jong aboncha avetsah a Solomon chu ahilchet ahitai.

David chun achapa Solomon jah a aseiyin, “Thahat jingin lang hangin, chule hiche hi hinbol tei teiyin, kicha hih bel’ in, lungthoina jong neidan; ijehinem itileh Pakai Pathen, keima Pathen chun nangma napanpi jing nai. Pakai houin sahna ding kinbol ding ijakai akichaisoh hel masanga Pakaiyin nangma nadalhah louhel ding, donlouva jong nakoi lou ding ahi.

Chujongle Pathen houinsunga toh ding kin ijakaiya pang dinga thempuho aloi loiya kihom khen ho leh Levi miho kigoltoh soh keipi hi vetan; chule mihem koi koi hijeng jongleh alungthima thanopna nei tapou chun ipi thepna nei jongleh athepna lam cheh a nangma napanhu cheh diu ahi; vaibol lamkaiho leh mipi jeng jong hi abonchauva nangma thu thua nung cheh diu ahinai,” ati.

David lengpan Houbung pumpi jah a aseiyin, “Kachapa Solomon, Pathenin achangseh a alhendoh pa hi achapang behseh nalaiyin, chule thil umdan ima phot toh anei hih laiye; ahinla anatoh ding hi ama din agihsa behseh jenge: ijeh-inem itileh leng inpi kisadoh ding jeng jong hi mihem ding ahipon, Pakai Pathen ding joh ahibouve.

Hijeh chun ken jong tuni chan geiyin kajo chanin ka-Pathen houin sahdohna dingin thil kakhomin, sana panna ding loma pang din sana kakhomin, dangka panna ding loma pang din dangka ka khome: chule sum-eng panna dinga loma pansah din jong sum-eng jong kakhomin, thih panna dinga loma pang din thih jong kakhomin ahi, thing panna dinga pang din thing kakhomin, phudoh ding song ho tailouvin onyx song ho jong simlouvin, songkang jong, songpol jong, song mantam ajat tampi kakhomsoh hel’in ahi.

Houin thenga manchah ding thil inthil kagondoh ho kalval jong hin keiman keija tum mong mongin thil kakhol’in, sana le dangka atumbeh kaneiye: hicheng jong hi ka-Pathen houin sahdohna dinga kakipehna dingin ka-Pathen houina din kapei.
Hichu sana talent sang thum alhingin, aboncha Ophir sana jeng ahi, phatecha kilhajol dangka talent sang sagi alhingin, hiche ho hi houin bang loijolna ding ahi;

chujongle mi khut themte toh ding natoh ijakaiya chu sana panna dia sana pang ding, dangka panna dinga dangka pang dinga kisem ahi. Chuti ahileh tunia hi mihem koipen tah alungthima thanom tah a kipedoh a, ama le ama Pakaiya kithenso jeng nom-ah um am?” ati.

Chutah chun apu apauva ainsung kailhah a phung upa chengsen jong ama lungcham chamin thil atoh uvin, phung lamkai ho leh sepai asang sang lamkaiho, aja ja lamkaiho bol bangin abol’uvin, chule lengpa natohna chunga vaibola pang ho bol bang bangin aboltauve.

Pathen houin sahna ding natohna manchah dingin amaho hin sana talent sang nga le sana jenga kisem daric sang som toh, dangka talent sang som toh, sum-eng talent sang som le sang get toh, chule thih talent sang ja khat jen atohdoh uvin ahi.
Chule mihem koi hijongleh song mantam neiho jousen Pakai houina thil kholna a apeuvin, Gershon chate lah a Jehi’el kitipa chu achingin apangin ahi.

Mipi jong chun mihon kipah thanom tah a apehdoh doh jeh-uvin akipa piuve: ijeh-inem itileh amahon alungthim pumpiuva acham chama Pakai dinga atodoh jengu ahitai; David lengpa jeng jong hachang pan akipah-e.
David chun Houbung pumpi mitmun Pakai avahchoiyin, hichea hin David’in aseitai, “Vo Pakai, nangma anun nom nahi: kapau Israel Pathen, nangma atonsot atonsot geiyin nun nomin.

Vo Pakai, nangma loupi chung nung thanei pen, chule aloupia nahin galjouva pang, lalloupina jouse nanga ahi: ijeh-inem itileh van le leiya um thil ijakai ho aboncha nanga ahitai: Vo Pakai, lenggam jeng jong nanga ahin, nangma hi ijakai chungvuma choi sanga um nahi.
Haona jouse le jabolna jouse nanga hung kon ahin, nangin ijakai chunga vai nahom jing jenge. Nakhut’a thaneina le thahatna aumin, nakhut’a hin mi jouse loupisah theina le thahat sah theina aumin ahi.
Hijeh chun tun ka-Pathenu nangma kathangvah uvin, namin loupi tah chu kachoi-an cheh uvin ahi.

Ahinla keima hi ipi beh kahiya, chule kamite hi ipi hiuvam, hitobanga keihon thanom tah a hibanga thil katodoh thei diu hi? Ajeh chu thil ijakai aboncha nanga hung konjeng ahin, nangma thilma ma chu keihon nangma kapeh kit’u ahibouve.
Ijeh-inem itileh nangma ang-sunga keiho hi kapu kapateu bang banga kholjin le khopem kahiuve; leiset chunga kahinkhou jong hi nisa lim bep ahin, imacha kiholsotna ding aumpoi.

Vo Pakai ka-Pathenu, keihon nangma min-thenga man dinga hiche houin khat sahdohna dinga thil hijat neng jeng junga kahinto khomsoh keiyu jong hi nangma khut’a hung kon jeng ahin, aboncha hi nanga ma ma ahi.

Ka-Pathen nangin mi lungthim nakhol jin, alungdih pa chunga nakipah-in nalung lhaiye, ti keiman kahei; kalungput adih dungjuiya keiman tua hi thil hijatpi hi kachamtah a kahinto doh jeng ahin, chujongle tuhin namite hikoma hung kikhom ho hi abonchauvin kamutai; amahon nangma dingin thil hijatpi hi achamtah uvin ahintoh doh jenguvin kipah tah-in nangma napeuve.

Vo Pakai, kapuu Abraham Pathen, Isaac Pathen, Israel Pathen; hitobang lungput hileh lunggel hi namite lungthim sunga atonsot geiyin chensah jing jengin, chule alung ngaitou chu nangma lama heipeh jing-jengin.

Kachapa Solomon jong hin alungthim pumpia nangma thupeh cheng-se anit’a, nangma hettohsahna jouse le nachondan jouse anit’a atohdoh sohkei nading in lungthim pen; hitia chu aman thilgon hijat hi amolsoa, inthil gonsa kakoiya hi leng inpi khat asahdoh tei teina din lungthim pen,” ati.

David chun Houbung pumpi jah a aseiyin, “Pakai na-Pathen u vahchoiyun,” atileh; Houbung pumpin Pakai apu apateu Pathen chu avahchoi cheh uvin, chule akun’uvin Pakai chu chibai aboh soh keiyun, lengpa jong jabolna avetsah cheh uvin ahi.

Ajing nikhon mipin jong Pakaiya kilhaina gantha a that uvin, Pakaiya pumgo thilto atoh uvin, bongchal sang khat toh, kelngoichal sang khat toh, kelngoi sang khat toh, chule lengpitwi thilto toh atoh uvin, Israel pumpi din kilhaina neng jeng jungin abol’uvin ahi;

chujongle hiche nikho hin amahon Pakai angsunga kipah tah-in an aneuvin lengpitwi adontauve. Chutengle David chapa Solomon chu aniveinan leng achansah kit’uvin, Solomon chu leng chang din thao anu’uvin, Zadok chu thempua pang din thao anu’-uve.
Chuin Solomon jong Pakai laltouna chunga chun apa David khel’in atoutai; Solomon chu ahung khangtou cheh cheh jengin, Israel pumpin athu angaitauve.
Lamkai jouse le mihat jouse, chule David chapate jousen jong Solomon lengpa panpi din agosoh keitauve.
Isreal pumpi mitmun Pakaiyin Solomon chu minthanna nasatah apen, ama masanga Israelte lah a aumkha loulai lalloupina nasa tah Solomon chunga aumsah tai.
Hitobang hin Jesse chapa David chu Israel pumpi chunga lengvaipon anapange.
Israelte chunga lengvaipoa apanna phat chu kum som li alhingin, Hebron khopia kum sagi lengvaipon apangin, Jerusalem khopia kum somthum le kumthum lengvai apoi.
Chujouvin haona le jabolna lhingin aneiyin, atehset mong mong anikho lhingset phat’in a thin, ama khel’in achapa Solomon lengvaipon apang tai.

David lengpa natoh thilbol jouse hi amasa a pat anukhah geiyin mitva neipa Samuel thusim lekhabua akisunin, Nathan themgaopa thusim lekhabua jong akisunin, mitva neipa Gad thusim lekhabua jong akisune;
athusim kisut dol chu avaihom dol jouse leh athahatna jouse jong, ama chung le Israel chunga hung lhung thilsoh aboncha ahin, lenggam jouse leh gamsung jousea thusoh jong akisuttha soh keiyin ahi.
